vocs:text-secondary">March 5, 2026</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">Release v1.4.0</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><aside data-v-callout data-v-context="info" data-v data-v-content><div data-v-callout-icon><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 16v-4"/><path d="M12 8h.01"/></svg></div>
<p data-v><strong data-v>This release is required for the T1C network upgrade with the following activation times:</strong></p>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>Moderato: Monday, March 9th at 16:00 CET (unix timestamp: 1773068400)</li>
<li data-v>Mainnet: Thursday, March 12th at 16:00 CET (unix timestamp: 1773327600)</li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Node operators must update before activation, otherwise nodes will fall out of sync with the network.</strong></p>
<p data-v>This release includes a breaking keychain-signature migration at T1C (only <code data-v>V2</code>signatures and hashes accepted post T1C).</p>
</aside>
<h2 data-v>Libraries &#x26; Tools</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><strong data-v>foundry</strong>: use v1.6.0-t1c (<code data-v>foundryup -n tempo -i v1.6.0-t1c</code>)</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>tempo-alloy</strong>: pin the dependency to v1.4.0</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>pytempo</strong>: use v0.3.1</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>tempo-go</strong>: use 0.3.0</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>viem</strong>: use 2.47.0</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-v>Breaking Changes</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><strong data-v>Migrated Keychain Signatures from legacy to V2:</strong> pre-T1C only legacy keychain signatures (<code data-v>V1</code>) are accepted, post-T1C only keychain signatures <code data-v>V2</code> (<code data-v>type 0x04</code>) are accepted. Pre T1C keys will continue to be accessible, only the signature type and hash calculations have changed.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>KeyAuthorization wildcard removed post-T1C:</strong> <code data-v>chain_id=0</code> is no longer valid after activation; key authorizations must use the exact Tempo chain ID.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>Precompile fork boundary update:</strong> precompiles switch from Prague to Osaka at T1C.</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>Added <code data-v>t1c</code> hardfork support in chainspec/genesis and activation wiring (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2860" data-v>#2860</a>).</li>
<li data-v>Bumped precompile set from Prague to Osaka at T1C (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2809" data-v>#2809</a>).</li>
<li data-v>Added keychain signature V2 support and hardfork-aware validation gates (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2867" data-v>#2867</a>).</li>
<li data-v>Enforced strict post-T1C key authorization <code data-v>chain_id</code> checks (no wildcard) (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2871" data-v>#2871</a>).</li>
<li data-v>Moved keychain and fee/reserve checks to the T1C boundary (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2861" data-v>#2861</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2862" data-v>#2862</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2866" data-v>#2866</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2870" data-v>#2870</a>).</li>
<li data-v>Improved txpool expiry/key tracking cleanup and paused-pool handling (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2874" data-v>#2874</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2878" data-v>#2878</a>).</li>
<li data-v>Added checkpoint-guarded atomic rollback protection for batched precompile state mutations (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2879" data-v>#2879</a>).</li>
<li data-v>Fixed fee-payer whitelist integration test coverage for T1C behavior (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2875" data-v>#2875</a>).</li>
</ul>
<p data-v>Full Changelog: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.1...v1.4.0" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.1...v1.4.0</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.3.1" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>Some node operators reported issues during high load on Moderato testnet. It is recommended for testnet and mainnet node operators to upgrade.</p>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1" 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2026-02-20T18:10:18Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 20, 2026</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">Release v1.3.0</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This patch release includes security hardening for expiring nonce replay protection and keychain precompile gas handling activated with T1A/T1B network upgrade. <strong data-v>It is required for all node operators to upgrade.</strong></p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>
<p data-v>fix: harden expiring nonce replay protection: Strengthens replay protection for expiring nonce transactions by using a hash derivation that is invariant to fee payer changes.</p>
</li>
<li data-v>
<p data-v>fix: update keychain precompile gas metering: Corrects gas accounting for keychain-authorized transactions to prevent double-charging, and ensures nonce is always properly incremented.</p>
</li>
<li data-v>
<p data-v>fix(evm): reset initial_gas in execution_result and catch_error: Fixes gas state handling in EVM error and result paths to ensure correct gas reporting.</p>
</li>
<li data-v>
<p data-v>feat: raise per-transaction gas limit on testnet: Removal of EIP-7825's 16.7M per-transaction gas limit cap, raising it to Tempo's 30M cap</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.2.0" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2026-02-13T17:40:21Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 13, 2026</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v1.2.0 (Mainnet-only)</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v><strong data-v>â ï¸ Mainnet-only upgrade for node operators. Do not upgrade your testnet nodes.</strong> This release fixes a validation bug on mainnet where transactions with gas limits above ~16.7M were incorrectly rejected, blocking large contract deployments. All node operators must upgrade to maintain network compatibility.</p>
<p data-v>Nodes running older versions will reject blocks containing transactions with gas limits above 16.7M. Upgrading promptly avoids falling out of sync when validators raise the limit.</p>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.4...v1.2.0" data-v>v1.1.4...v1.2.0</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.1.4" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:scroll-mt-20" data-v-changelog-release="true"><div class="vocs:hidden vocs:md:block vocs:w-36 vocs:shrink-0"><div vocs:z-10"></div><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.4" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="vocs:inline-flex vocs:items-center vocs:gap-1.5 vocs:text-sm xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="vocs:size-3 vocs:opacity-60"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 3h6v6m-11 5L21 3m-3 10v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2026-02-12T22:56:14Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 12, 2026</time></div><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This patch release includes fixes for stablecoin DEX error handling, RPC gas estimation, transaction pool validation, and improved consensus peer management. We recommend all node operators upgrade.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(stablecoin-dex): propagate system errors on <code data-v>place_flip()</code></strong> by <a href="https://github.com/0xrusowsky" data-v>@0xrusowsky</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2654" data-v>#2654</a>: System errors (like out-of-gas, arithmetic panics, or DB errors) from <code data-v>place_flip()</code> calls were being silently swallowed. This fix ensures they are properly propagated.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(evm): use TIP_FEE_MANAGER_ADDRESS as RPC simulation beneficiary</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/0xrusowsky" data-v>@0xrusowsky</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2672" data-v>#2672</a>: Amends the RPC gas estimation fix from v1.1.3 â <code data-v>Address::ZERO</code> didn't work as the sentinel beneficiary because genesis maps <code data-v>validatorTokens[Address::ZERO]</code> to a <code data-v>"DONOTUSE"</code> token, triggering liquidity errors. This switches to <code data-v>TIP_FEE_MANAGER_ADDRESS</code> which correctly falls back to the default fee token.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(txpool): mark system/fee payer sig errors as invalid txs</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/fgimenez" data-v>@fgimenez</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2652" data-v>#2652</a>: Transactions with invalid system or fee payer signatures were not being correctly marked as invalid in the pool. They are now properly rejected.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>refactor(consensus): move peer tracking to self standing actor</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/SuperFluffy" data-v>@SuperFluffy</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2617" data-v>#2617</a>: Prepares peer management for TIP-1017 by moving it to a standalone actor that can track finalized blocks for peer set changes.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>feat(storage): add block_number() to PrecompileStorageProvider trait</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/howydev" data-v>@howydev</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2667" data-v>#2667</a>: Adds <code data-v>block_number()</code> to the storage provider trait, needed by ValidatorConfigV2 to track <code data-v>addedAtHeight</code>/<code data-v>deactivatedAtHeight</code>.</li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.3...v1.1.4" data-v>v1.1.3...v1.1.4</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.1.3" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:scroll-mt-20" data-v-changelog-release="true"><div class="vocs:hidden vocs:md:block vocs:w-36 vocs:shrink-0"><div class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 12, 2026</time></div></div><div class="vocs:hidden vocs:md:block vocs:absolute vocs:left-36 vocs:top-8 vocs:bottom-0 vocs:ml-4 vocs:w-px vocs:border-l vocs:border-primary"></div><div class="vocs:flex-1 vocs:min-w-0 vocs:py-6 vocs:border-b vocs:border-primary vocs:last:border-b-0"><div class="vocs:md:hidden vocs:flex vocs:items-center vocs:gap-3 vocs:mb-4"><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="vocs:inline-flex vocs:items-center vocs:gap-1.5 vocs:text-sm vocs:font-mono vocs:font-medium vocs:text-heading vocs:bg-surfaceTint vocs:border vocs:border-primary vocs:px-2.5 vocs:py-1 vocs:rounded-md vocs:hover:bg-surfaceTint/80 vocs:transition-colors">v1.1.3<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="vocs:size-3 vocs:opacity-60"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 3h6v6m-11 5L21 3m-3 10v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2026-02-12T17:35:32Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 12, 2026</time></div><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This patch release includes several important fixes for gas estimation, transaction pool eviction, and account abstraction transaction handling, along with improved peer discovery and installer reliability. We recommend all node operators upgrade.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(chainspec): set explicit tx_gas_limit_cap for T0/Genesis to prevent EIP-7825 fallback</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/gakonst" data-v>@gakonst</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2649" data-v>#2649</a>: <code data-v>eth_estimateGas</code> was broken on mainnet â returning <code data-v>intrinsic gas too high</code> for all calls without an explicit gas limit. The root cause was that T0/Genesis returned <code data-v>None</code> for <code data-v>tx_gas_limit_cap()</code>, causing revm to fall back to EIP-7825's protocol default of 2Â²â´ (~16.7M), which capped the binary search and triggered validation failures. This fix sets an explicit gas limit cap for T0/Genesis.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(evm): use default fee token for RPC gas estimation to avoid validator token mismatch</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/fgimenez" data-v>@fgimenez</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2588" data-v>#2588</a>: Gas estimation via RPC could fail when the validator's configured fee token differed from the caller's. This fix uses the default fee token for RPC gas estimation, ensuring consistent results regardless of validator configuration.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(alloy): preserve key_authorization in build_aa and route AA txs in SignableTxRequest</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/fgimenez" data-v>@fgimenez</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2598" data-v>#2598</a>: Account abstraction transactions could lose their <code data-v>key_authorization</code> field during construction, causing them to be rejected. This fix preserves the field and correctly routes AA transactions through <code data-v>SignableTxRequest</code>.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(txpool): cache key auth expiry for pool eviction</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/fgimenez" data-v>@fgimenez</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2637" data-v>#2637</a>: Transactions with expiring key authorizations were not being evicted from the pool after expiry. The transaction pool now caches and checks key auth expiry for proper eviction.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>feat: enable discv5 by default</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/Rjected" data-v>@Rjected</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2634" data-v>#2634</a>: Discovery v5 is now enabled by default, improving peer discovery and network connectivity.</li>
<li data-v><strong data-v>feat(p2p): add more default bootnodes for mainnet and testnet</strong> by <a href="https://github.com/Zygimantass" data-v>@Zygimantass</a> in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2231" data-v>#2231</a>: Adds additional default boot nodes for both mainnet and testnet, improving initial peer connectivity.</li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.2...v1.1.3" data-v>v1.1.2...v1.1.3</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article vocs:font-medium vocs:text-heading vocs:bg-surfaceTint vocs:border vocs:border-primary vocs:px-2.5 vocs:py-1 vocs:rounded-md vocs:hover:bg-surfaceTint/80 vocs:transition-colors">v1.1.2<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="vocs:size-3 vocs:opacity-60"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 3h6v6m-11 5L21 3m-3 10v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2026-02-10T22:07:18Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 10, 2026</time></div><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This patch release includes a fix for an issue affecting follower nodes. If you're using <code data-v>tempo --follow</code>, we recommend upgrading to this release.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>fix: install default rustls crypto provider on startup by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2606" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2606</a>: A recent dependency upgrade (rustls 0.23+) removed the built-in default crypto provider, causing nodes to panic with no process-level CryptoProvider available when opening WebSocket connections. This release explicitly installs the ring crypto provider at startup.</li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.1...v1.1.2" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.1...v1.1.2</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.1.1" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:scroll-mt-20" data-v-changelog-release="true"><div class="vocs:hidden vocs:md:block vocs:w-36 vocs:shrink-0"><div class="vocs:sticky vocs:top-20 vocs:flex vocs:flex-col vocs:gap-2 vocs:py-6"><div vocs:md:block vocs:absolute vocs:left-36 vocs:top-8 vocs:bottom-0 vocs:ml-4 vocs:w-px vocs:border-l vocs:border-primary"></div><div class="vocs:flex-1 vocs:min-w-0 vocs:py-6 vocs:border-b vocs:border-primary vocs:last:border-b-0"><div class="vocs:md:hidden vocs:flex vocs:items-center vocs:gap-3 vocs:mb-4"><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.1" target="_blank" vocs:px-2.5 vocs:py-1 vocs:rounded-md vocs:hover:bg-surfaceTint/80 vocs:transition-colors">v1.1.1<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="vocs:size-3 vocs:opacity-60"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 3h6v6m-11 5L21 3m-3 10v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2026-02-10T18:49:51Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 10, 2026</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v1.1.1 - T1 (Bach) Mainnet Network Upgrade</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>v1.1.1 - T1 (Bach) Mainnet Network Upgrade</h2>
<aside data-v-callout data-v-context="info" data-v data-v-content><div data-v-callout-icon><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 16v-4"/><path d="M12 8h.01"/></svg></div>
<p data-v><strong data-v>This release is required for the Bach (T1) mainnet network upgrade scheduled for Thursday, Feb 12th 2026 16:00 CET.</strong> Node operators must update their nodes, otherwise your nodes will fall out of sync with the network. This release focuses on mainnet-ready gas economics, expiring nonces, and security hardening from recent audits.</p>
</aside>
<p data-v>The Bach (T1) network upgrade implements three major TIPs:</p>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000" data-v>TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase</a></li>
<li data-v><a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009" data-v>TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces</a></li>
<li data-v><a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010" data-v>TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters</a></li>
</ul>
<h3 data-v>Security &#x26; Bug Fixes</h3>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>Addresses security findings from audits hardening access keys, DEX, and transaction pool correctness: : <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2528" data-v>#2528</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2522" data-v>#2522</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2553" data-v>#2553</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2521" data-v>#2521</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2496" data-v>#2496</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2513" data-v>#2513</a></li>
<li data-v>Fixes <code data-v>tempo download</code> defaulting to testnet, <code data-v>tempoup</code> GPG verification for older versions, expiring nonce handling in <code data-v>eth_fillTransaction</code>, and genesis nonce key gas charging: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2587" data-v>#2587</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2557" data-v>#2557</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2491" data-v>#2491</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2573" data-v>#2573</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1" data-v>v1.1.0...v1.1.1</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.1.0" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:scroll-mt-20" data-v-changelog-release="true"><div class="vocs:hidden vocs:md:block vocs:w-36 vocs:shrink-0"><div class="vocs:sticky vocs:top-20 vocs:flex vocs:flex-col vocs:gap-2 vocs:py-6"><div class="vocs:absolute vocs:left-[calc(100%+1rem)] vocs:top-8 vocs:w-2.5 vocs:h-2.5 vocs:rounded-full vocs:bg-secondary vocs:z-10"></div><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="vocs:inline-flex vocs:items-center vocs:gap-1.5 vocs:text-sm vocs:font-mono vocs:font-medium vocs:text-heading vocs:bg-surfaceTint vocs:border vocs:border-primary vocs:px-2.5 vocs:py-1 vocs:rounded-md vocs:w-fit vocs:hover:bg-surfaceTint/80 vocs:transition-colors">v1.1.0<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="vocs:size-3 vocs:opacity-60"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 3h6v6m-11 5L21 3m-3 10v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2026-02-03T21:53:37Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 3, 2026</time></div></div><div class="vocs:hidden vocs:md:block vocs:absolute vocs:left-36 vocs:top-8 vocs:bottom-0 vocs:ml-4 vocs:w-px vocs:border-l vocs:border-primary"></div><div class="vocs:flex-1 vocs:min-w-0 vocs:py-6 vocs:border-b vocs:border-primary vocs:last:border-b-0"><div class="vocs:md:hidden vocs:flex vocs:items-center vocs:gap-3 vocs:mb-4"><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="vocs:inline-flex vocs:items-center vocs:gap-1.5 vocs:text-sm vocs:font-mono vocs:font-medium vocs:text-heading vocs:bg-surfaceTint vocs:border vocs:border-primary vocs:px-2.5 vocs:py-1 vocs:rounded-md vocs:hover:bg-surfaceTint/80 vocs:transition-colors">v1.1.0<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="vocs:size-3 vocs:opacity-60"><path fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 3h6v6m-11 5L21 3m-3 10v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2026-02-03T21:53:37Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">February 3, 2026</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v1.1.0 - T1 (Bach) Testnet Network Upgrade</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><aside data-v-callout data-v-context="info" data-v data-v-content><div data-v-callout-icon><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1em" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 16v-4"/><path d="M12 8h.01"/></svg></div>
<p data-v><strong data-v>This release is required for the Bach (T1) network upgrade scheduled for Thursday, Feb 5th 2026 16:00 CET.</strong> Node operators must update their nodes, otherwise your nodes will fall out of sync with the network. This release focuses on mainnet-ready gas economics, expiring nonces, and security hardening from recent audits.</p>
</aside>
<p data-v>The Bach (T1) network upgrade implements three major TIPs:</p>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000" data-v>TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase</a></li>
<li data-v><a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009" data-v>TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces</a></li>
<li data-v><a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010" data-v>TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v>This release includes breaking changes on the CLI, precompile interface, please read the release notes carefully.</p>
<hr data-v>
<h2 data-v>Network Upgrade Changes</h2>
<h3 data-v>TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase</h3>
<p data-v>Tempo's high throughput makes it vulnerable to state growth attacks where adversaries could create terabytes of permanent state at low cost. <a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000" data-v>TIP-1000</a> increases state creation costs by 12.5x, making such attacks economically infeasible (~$50M to create 1TB of state). Transfers to new addresses now cost ~300k gas (was ~70k), and contract deployments cost 5-10x more.</p>
<div data-v-table-wrapper><table data-v>
<thead data-v>
<tr data-v>
<th data-v>Operation</th>
<th data-v>Before</th>
<th data-v>After</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-v>
<tr data-v>
<td data-v>New state element (SSTORE zero â non-zero)</td>
<td data-v>20,000 gas</td>
<td data-v>250,000 gas</td>
</tr>
<tr data-v>
<td data-v>Account creation (first nonce write)</td>
<td data-v>0 gas</td>
<td data-v>250,000 gas</td>
</tr>
<tr data-v>
<td data-v>Contract creation per byte</td>
<td data-v>200 gas</td>
<td data-v>1,000 gas</td>
</tr>
<tr data-v>
<td data-v>Contract creation base (keccak + codesize)</td>
<td data-v>included</td>
<td data-v>500,000 gas</td>
</tr>
<tr data-v>
<td data-v>Transaction gas cap</td>
<td data-v>16M gas</td>
<td data-v>30M gas</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>
<h3 data-v>TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces</h3>
<p data-v>Traditional sequential nonces create friction for gasless transactions and parallel submission. If transaction N fails, all subsequent transactions are blocked. Additionally, 2D nonces (nonce keys) can lead to permanent state bloat since unused nonce keys are stored forever. <a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009" data-v>TIP-1009</a> introduces expiring nonces: Transactions specify a <code data-v>validBefore</code> timestamp (max 30s in future) instead of a sequential nonce. A fixed-size circular buffer (300k entries) automatically evicts expired entries, preventing state growth. This enables relayers to submit multiple transactions in parallel without complex nonce management, while eliminating the state bloat attack vector.</p>
<p data-v>(<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2121" data-v>#2121</a>): Time-bounded replay protection using transaction hashes. Transactions use <code data-v>nonceKey = uint256.max</code> with <code data-v>validBefore</code> timestamp (max 30s in future). Enables gasless/meta-transactions and parallel submission.</p>
<h3 data-v>TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters</h3>
<p data-v><a href="https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010" data-v>TIP-1010</a> calibrates Tempo's mainnet gas parameters, balancing high throughput with sustainable fee levels. The base fee increase to 20 gwei maintains the target of ~0.1 cent per TIP-20 transfer while providing better spam protection. The 500M block gas limit ensures sufficient capacity for payment transactions.</p>
<p data-v>(<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2194" data-v>#2194</a>):</p>
<div data-v-table-wrapper><table data-v>
<thead data-v>
<tr data-v>
<th data-v>Parameter</th>
<th data-v>Before</th>
<th data-v>After</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody data-v>
<tr data-v>
<td data-v>Base fee</td>
<td data-v>10 gwei</td>
<td data-v>20 gwei</td>
</tr>
<tr data-v>
<td data-v>Total block gas limit</td>
<td data-v>-</td>
<td data-v>500M gas</td>
</tr>
<tr data-v>
<td data-v>General gas limit</td>
<td data-v>-</td>
<td data-v>30M gas/block</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>
<h2 data-v>New Features</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2172" data-v>Unified Telemetry Configuration</a>: New <code data-v>--telemetry-url &#x3C;URL></code> flag configures metrics and logs export in a single option. Pushes both reth and consensus metrics with a <code data-v>consensus_id</code> label for node identification. <strong data-v>We ask all validators to configure the <code data-v>--telemetry-url</code> so we can support troubleshooting</strong>.</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2288" data-v>Separate Consensus Storage Directory</a>: New <code data-v>--consensus.datadir &#x3C;PATH></code> flag allows validators to store consensus data on a separate volume (e.g., AWS EBS) while keeping execution state on high-performance local disks. Migrate by copying <code data-v>&#x3C;datadir>/consensus</code> to the new location.</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2179" data-v>Validator Info CLI Command</a>: New <code data-v>consensus validators-info</code> subcommand</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2267" data-v>Validator Health Dashboard</a>: New Grafana dashboard for validator monitoring</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2283" data-v>Fee Payer Signature Support</a>: <code data-v>TempoTransactionRequest</code> supports <code data-v>fee_payer_signature</code></li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2266" data-v>Expiring Nonce Setters</a>: Added <code data-v>valid_before</code>/<code data-v>valid_after</code> setters to <code data-v>TempoTransactionRequest</code></li>
</ul>
<h2 data-v>Breaking Changes</h2>
<h3 data-v>CLI Changes</h3>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Testnet Chain Name:</strong> Testnet nodes must now use <code data-v>--chain moderato</code>. The previous <code data-v>andantino</code> chainspec has been removed. Update node startup scripts and systemd services accordingly (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1876" data-v>#1876</a>, introduced in v1.0.0)</p>
</li>
<li data-v>
<p data-v><strong data-v>CLI Force Flag:</strong> <code data-v>--delete-signing-share</code> now requires <code data-v>--force</code> flag to prevent accidental deletion of validator signing keys. Update any automation scripts that manage validator key lifecycle (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2215" data-v>#2215</a>).</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-v>Precompile Interface Changes</h3>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Precompile Revert Behavior:</strong> Precompiles now revert with a standard error (instead of returning a precompile-specific error) when calldata is less than 4 bytes (missing function selector). This aligns precompile behavior with regular Solidity contracts. Update <code data-v>try/catch</code> blocks and test assertions that expected the old error type (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2083" data-v>#2083</a>).</p>
</li>
<li data-v>
<p data-v><strong data-v>ValidatorConfig Signature Change:</strong> <code data-v>changeValidatorStatus(address, bool)</code> now takes a <code data-v>uint64 index</code> instead of address. This prevents front-running attacks where a malicious validator could rotate their address before deactivation. Callers must now look up the validator's index in the validator array (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2188" data-v>#2188</a>).</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-v>Access Key / Keychain Changes</h3>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><strong data-v>Keychain Signature Validation:</strong> Signature type (secp256k1, secp256r1, etc.) must now match the <code data-v>key_type</code> stored when the key was authorized. This closes a security gap where a key authorized for one curve could potentially be used with a different signature scheme. Transactions with mismatched types are rejected at the mempool level (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2178" data-v>#2178</a>).</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-v>Gas Economics (T1 Network Upgrade)</h3>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>
<p data-v><strong data-v>2D Nonce Key Gas (TIP-1000):</strong> Accessing an existing 2D nonce key now costs 5,000 gas (was 0). Update gas estimates for transactions using 2D nonces (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2362" data-v>#2362</a>).</p>
</li>
<li data-v>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Developer Action Required:</strong> The gas cost changes in TIP-1000 and TIP-1010 (see tables above) require updating <code data-v>gas_limit</code> values in your configuration, <code data-v>estimateGas()</code> calls, and any hardcoded <code data-v>gasPrice</code> or <code data-v>maxFeePerGas</code> values in scripts and transaction builders.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-v>Security Fixes</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2178" data-v>Signature Type Validation</a>: Verifies signature type matches <code data-v>key_type</code>, closing a security gap where authorized keys could potentially be used with a different signature scheme.</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2188" data-v>ValidatorConfig Front-running Fix</a>: Uses validator index instead of address in <code data-v>changeValidatorStatus</code> to prevent malicious validators from evading deactivation by rotating addresses.</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2358" data-v>Transaction Pool DoS Hardening</a>: Multiple fixes to prevent eviction-based DoS attacks (<a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2352" data-v>#2352</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2327" data-v>#2327</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2216" data-v>#2216</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2242" data-v>#2242</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2183" data-v>#2183</a>, <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2167" data-v>#2167</a>)</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2329" data-v>Checkpoint Revert on Key Authorization OOG</a>: Properly reverts state on out-of-gas during key authorization.</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2223" data-v>Reject Expired Access Keys</a>: Mempool rejects transactions with expired access keys.</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2041" data-v>Reject Paused TIP20 Tokens</a>: Prevents fee validation bypass using paused tokens.</li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.2...v1.1.0" data-v>v1.0.2...v1.1.0</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article vocs:text-secondary">January 21, 2026</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v1.0.2 - the Presto release</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This release updates Reth depdendency to <code data-v>v1.10.1</code> and revm to <code data-v>v34.0.0</code>, bringing improvements to snapshot syncing and validator performance.</p>
<h2 data-v>Highlights</h2>
<h3 data-v>Improvements</h3>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/releases/tag/v1.10.1" data-v>Reth v1.10.1 Upgrade</a>: Engine optimization for validator node sync performance: Explicitly requests head block download after backfill to prevent stalls (<a href="https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/pull/21161" data-v>reth#21150</a>)</li>
<li data-v>Resumable Snapshot Downloads: More reliable snapshot syncing with auto-retry support, improving sync reliability on unstable connections (<a href="https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/pull/21150" data-v>reth#21161</a>)</li>
<li data-v><a href="https://github.com/bluealloy/revm/releases/tag/v103" data-v>Revm v34.0.0</a>: Latest EVM execution improvements and alloy-evm compatibility</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-v>New Features</h3>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>New <code data-v>consensus_getIdentityTransitionProof</code> RPC method (#1918): Retrieve identity transition proofs with DKG outcomes and BLS certificates for network identity changes. Supports querying from specific epochs and retrieving full history back to genesis.</li>
</ul>
<h3 data-v>What's Changed</h3>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>feat: v1.0.1 release by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2165" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2165</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(specs): account for ceiling rounding in PlaceOrder fuzz test bound by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2146" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2146</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add consensus_getIdentityTransitionProof by @joshieDo in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1918" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1918</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(test): use correct PRICE_SCALE in StablecoinDEX fuzz test by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2174" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2174</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: bump revm v34.0.0 by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1762" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1762</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: v1.0.2 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2182" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2182</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump reth to v1.10.1 by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2186" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2186</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: update reth to tmp branch by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2193" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2193</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.1...v1.0.2" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.1...v1.0.2</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.0.1" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:mb-4">v1.0.1 - the Presto release</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This release fixes a bug in the syncing process and adds resumable downloads to snapshots (using <code data-v>tempo download</code>).</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>Disable reexecute for now by @kamsz in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2131" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2131</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(docs): add server-side tracking for AI crawlers by @snario in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2129" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2129</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: tempo transaction Invariant tests by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2037" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2037</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: bump to gakonst fork by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2137" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2137</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(consensus): periodically send heartbeat FCU to EL by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2148" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2148</a></li>
<li data-v>test(tempo-revm): add property-based tests for tx, block, and handler modules by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2030" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2030</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(txpool): evict AA transactions when signing key is revoked by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2035" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2035</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(consensus): bump commonware to 374285d, use metric attributes by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2164" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2164</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.1" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.1</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.0.0" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:mb-4">v1.0.0 - the Presto release</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>chore: rename bench.nu to tempo.nu by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1698" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1698</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(docs): add validator guide by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1559" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1559</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(llm): add amp tools for tempo.nu by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1704" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1704</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(docs): allegro moderato  by @jenpaff in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1653" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1653</a></li>
<li data-v>Fix the Artemis Tempo link by @akegaviar in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1584" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1584</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: implement PostHog custom event tracking for docs by @juandolealt in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1687" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1687</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(deps): run cargo shear by @DaniPopes in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1691" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1691</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(xtask): move generate-signing-key to consensus subcmd by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1551" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1551</a></li>
<li data-v>Add <code data-v>stable</code> Docker tag for tag-triggered builds by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1737" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1737</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: propagate features correctly by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1731" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1731</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: clean-up 2d nonce pool tracker by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1738" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1738</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add RUSTSEC-2025-0137 to deny.toml by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1745" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1745</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(consensus): remove all pre-allegretto logic by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1671" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1671</a></li>
<li data-v>Partition <code data-v>cargo hack check</code> into 2 CI matrix jobs by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1748" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1748</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add dRPC in Developer tools by @joshitzko in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1747" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1747</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add theta and path USD to fee token guide by @struong in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1754" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1754</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: Tempo Transaction guide in nav by @struong in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1756" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1756</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump commonware to 4a5fca0 by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1678" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1678</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(stablecoin-exchange): use centralized price conversion functions  by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1763" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1763</a></li>
<li data-v>faucet fix by @malleshpai in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1771" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1771</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(docs): correct safe deployer repo by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1728" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1728</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: catch slot collisions when using <code data-v>base_slot</code> attrib by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1777" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1777</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: support UP/UV validation sigs to always accept UV=1 by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1652" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1652</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor!(consensus): standardize dkg with upstream commonware by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1759" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1759</a></li>
<li data-v>chore!: bump commonware to v0.0.64 by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1778" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1778</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!: remove hardfork logic by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1707" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1707</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tip20): add getPendingRewards view function to query claimable rewards without state change by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1632" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1632</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): reject zero public key in ValidatorConfig to prevent non-existent validators by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1630" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1630</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(consensus): backfill missing execution layer blocks by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1781" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1781</a></li>
<li data-v>perf(orderbook): optimize tick bitmap traversal using word-level bit manipulation by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1622" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1622</a></li>
<li data-v>perf: remove redundant balance read in transfer by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1793" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1793</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(stablecoin-exchange): use consistent rounding for bid order cancel refunds by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1795" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1795</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(specs): update reference implementation of stablecoin DEX by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1796" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1796</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(rpc): mitigate subblock tx DoS via early validator filtering and increased channel capacity by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1628" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1628</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: add pause check to transfer_fee_pre_tx by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1799" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1799</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: validator fee tracking by token by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1798" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1798</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: update auth checks when claiming rewards by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1800" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1800</a></li>
<li data-v>Bump commonware to d16c7481c72cf6f19b77e1435f1e5dd8e32a1aac by @kamsz in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1804" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1804</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: increase min order amount for stable dex orders by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1802" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1802</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: add revert if policy doesn't exist by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1801" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1801</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: remove outdated pending swaps claim from burn function by @yongkangc in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1810" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1810</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add new MintWithValidatorToken event with  field by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1466" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1466</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(dex): have flip orders only draw from internal balances by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1806" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1806</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(specs): function to cancel stale order by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1794" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1794</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(executor): propagate fork choice update errors  by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1774" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1774</a></li>
<li data-v>docs(specs): change DEX pair storage layout to be order-sensitive by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1791" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1791</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(specs): check 403 policy on both tokens in stablecoin DEX by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1805" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1805</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: remove compact hack for mainnet by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1814" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1814</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: std <code data-v>get_validator_token</code> to return the default token when unset by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1651" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1651</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: intrinsic gas checks in validator by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1666" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1666</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: incorrect permit2 bytecode by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1789" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1789</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(audit): misc comments from auditors by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1662" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1662</a></li>
<li data-v>Add info on supported platforms by @jenpaff in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1837" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1837</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(dex): upcast to U256 before mulDiv in base_to_quote and quote_to_base by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1835" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1835</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: prevent index overflow in <code data-v>VecHandler</code> by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1631" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1631</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: ensure mutable TIP20Token calls point to initialized addresses by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1790" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1790</a></li>
<li data-v>docs(alloy): add tip20 example in crate docs by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1830" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1830</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: monitor pool creation by listening events + use token WL by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1820" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1820</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(dex): round up baseNeeded in exactOut for bids by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1823" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1823</a></li>
<li data-v>use a larger runner for docs generation by @brendanjryan in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1840" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1840</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add re-dkg trigger methods to validator precompile by @joshieDo in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1680" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1680</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(consensus): fast sync by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1822" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1822</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(consensus): start at the latest finalized height, not at genesis by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1838" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1838</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: create address calculations + restrictions by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1792" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1792</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: remove TODOs, FIXMEs by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1843" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1843</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add full dkg mechanism  by @joshieDo in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1821" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1821</a></li>
<li data-v>add missing article to tempo txn docs by @brendanjryan in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1850" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1850</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(docs): bump viem to 2.43.5 by @struong in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1849" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1849</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(xtask): add genesis customization options by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1836" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1836</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: validate calls inside handler by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1845" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1845</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(revm): don't re-bump nonce on  CREATE revert with 2D nonces by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1851" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1851</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles-macros): account for last field <code data-v>SLOTS</code> by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1847" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1847</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!: change tip20 deployment scheme by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1819" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1819</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: properly check if an account is cold when loading its info by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1855" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1855</a></li>

<li data-v>chore: simplify size functions by @DaniPopes in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1965" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1965</a></li>

<li data-v>test: stablecoin DEX invariant tests by @grandizzy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1924" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1924</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(payload-builder): align timestamp validation with handler by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2017" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2017</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: <code data-v>robots.txt</code> + gsc by @o-az in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1919" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1919</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(primitives): cleanup by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2036" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2036</a></li>
<li data-v>test(primitives): ensure webauthn injection is not possible by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2038" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2038</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: FeeAMM &#x26; FeeManager invariant testing by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2025" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2025</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(revm): replace AccessKeyAuthorizationFailed with concrete error types by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2040" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2040</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase by @dankrad in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2034" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2034</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): use Secp256k1Signer for better signing performance by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2052" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2052</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1003: client order IDs by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2023" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2023</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1002: prevent crossed orders by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2022" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2022</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add TIP-1004 for permit() on TIP-20 by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2024" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2024</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: tweaks by @tmm in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2019" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2019</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1005: fix ask swap rounding loss by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2029" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2029</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1001: place-only mode for next quote token by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2021" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2021</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add dynamic SEO metadata to all pages by @juandolealt in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2018" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2018</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(executor): remove fill_holes backfill logic by @joshieDo in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2056" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2056</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: rc6 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2059" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2059</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: pin GitHub Actions to full-length commit SHAs by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2050" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2050</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(consensus): bump spammy log to trace by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2060" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2060</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(specs): remove incorrect TEMPO-AMM30 validator reserve assertion by @grandizzy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2061" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2061</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(docs): use checksummed address for Account Keychain precompile by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2062" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2062</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(docs): use absolute URLs for og:image by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2058" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2058</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add unit tests for 2 edge cases by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1994" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1994</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): remove outdated order processing comment by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2020" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2020</a></li>
<li data-v>test(transaction-pool): add unit tests for access key validation by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2028" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2028</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump reth to v1.10.0 by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2051" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2051</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(transaction-pool): consolidate tests and remove low-value test coverage by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1971" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1971</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: update gitignore by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2078" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2078</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump commonware to v0.0.65 by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2080" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2080</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add TIPs overview page by @snario in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2070" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2070</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(txpool): add configurable limit for AA authorization list size by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2009" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2009</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1006: burnAt for TIP-20 tokens by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2033" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2033</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: encode full finalization/notarization in consensus namespace by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2079" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2079</a></li>
<li data-v>ci: move flaky test into separate step by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2082" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2082</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump commonware to f966223 by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2081" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2081</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(deny): ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0003 cmov timing advisory (ARM32 not targeted) by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2091" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2091</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(revm): move 2D nonce gas calculation to intrinsic gas by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2053" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2053</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(revm): validate TIP20 token before balance lookup to prevent panic by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2069" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2069</a></li>
<li data-v>txpool: reduce LAST_SEEN_TOKENS_WINDOW from 100 to 10 by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2095" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2095</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: optimize allocation in get_pooled_transaction_elements by preâallocating capacity by @0xKarl98 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1766" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1766</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add TIP-1007 specification for fee token introspection by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2092" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2092</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: rename sub-blocks to subblocks by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2101" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2101</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: rc7 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2099" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2099</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): add --faucet-url option to max_tps command by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2104" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2104</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(cli): implement consensus subcommand as ExtSubCmd by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1839" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1839</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add transfer memos guide by @juandolealt in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1884" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1884</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(test): Test initial gas for simple tx and batch calls by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1992" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1992</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!: validate expiry is in the future when authorizing access keys by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1956" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1956</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(consensus): deduplicate metrics by attaching the epoch by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2093" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2093</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(ci): fix re-execute flaky snapshot download by @kuyziss in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2084" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2084</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add legacy Andantino explorer link to network upgrades page by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2122" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2122</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: v1 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2125" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2125</a></li>
</ul>

class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>v1.0.0-rc.7 bumps the upstream Reth version for performance improvements and downgrades a few noisy logging messages to <code data-v>trace</code>. This is not an urgent releases for both block producing and RPC nodes.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>chore(consensus): bump spammy log to trace by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2060" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2060</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(specs): remove incorrect TEMPO-AMM30 validator reserve assertion by @grandizzy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2061" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2061</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(docs): use checksummed address for Account Keychain precompile by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2062" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2062</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(docs): use absolute URLs for og:image by @gakonst in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2058" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2058</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add unit tests for 2 edge cases by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1994" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1994</a></li>

<li data-v>test(transaction-pool): add unit tests for access key validation by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2028" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2028</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump reth to v1.10.0 by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2051" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2051</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(transaction-pool): consolidate tests and remove low-value test coverage by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1971" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1971</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: update gitignore by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2078" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2078</a></li>

data-v-context="warning">Pre-release</span></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v1.0.0-rc.6 - Mainnet candidate</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>Release v1.0.0-rc.6</h2>
<p data-v><code data-v>v1.0.0-rc.6</code> fixes a bug in the syncing process for block producing nodes. We recommend that Moderato block producers upgrade to this release whenever convenient.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>test(primitives): ensure webauthn injection is not possible by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2038" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2038</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: FeeAMM &#x26; FeeManager invariant testing by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2025" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2025</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(revm): replace AccessKeyAuthorizationFailed with concrete error types by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2040" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2040</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase by @dankrad in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2034" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2034</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): use Secp256k1Signer for better signing performance by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2052" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2052</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1003: client order IDs by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2023" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2023</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1002: prevent crossed orders by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2022" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2022</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add TIP-1004 for permit() on TIP-20 by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2024" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2024</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: tweaks by @tmm in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2019" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2019</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1005: fix ask swap rounding loss by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2029" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2029</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1001: place-only mode for next quote token by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2021" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2021</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add dynamic SEO metadata to all pages by @juandolealt in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2018" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2018</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(executor): remove fill_holes backfill logic by @joshieDo in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2056" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2056</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: rc6 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2059" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2059</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: pin GitHub Actions to full-length commit SHAs by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2050" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2050</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.5...v1.0.0-rc.6" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.5...v1.0.0-rc.6</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v1.0.0-rc.5" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12
