vocs:mb-4">v0.7.3 - Public testnet launch</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>fix: update size fn for tempo transaction by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1298" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1298</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: allow skips in test-success by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1282" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1282</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: remove paths-ignore in test workflow by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1314" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1314</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: re-add <code data-v>reward</code> and <code data-v>fund</code> ts sdk entries by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1283" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1283</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(evm): add ExecutionResult to SystemTransactionFailed error by @Rjected in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1241" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1241</a></li>
<li data-v>edits, links by @malleshpai in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1284" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1284</a></li>

<li data-v>fix: skip 2d nonce filling for zero nonce key by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1315" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1315</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add block explorer to wallet add dialog by @snario in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1311" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1311</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: bug where wallet UI doesn't show on connection-details page by @snario in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1312" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1312</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add ability to add testnet tokens with a button by @snario in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1313" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1313</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump docs install to 0.7.2 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1308" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1308</a></li>
<li data-v>docs: add introductory text for what tempo is by @snario in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1303" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1303</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: small docs fixes by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1310" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1310</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump to 0.7.3 by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1316" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1316</a></li>

vocs:mb-4">v0.7.2 - Public testnet launch</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>chore: bump reth by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1170" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1170</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: await FCU on proposal by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1181" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1181</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor: convert free functions to TempoTypedTransaction methods by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1187" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1187</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(xtask): add subcmd to generate signing keys by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1180" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1180</a></li>
<li data-v>Revert "refactor(tempo-bench): remove filler generic and introduce BenchProvider (#1172)" by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1188" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1188</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(builder): gas used and gas/s metrics by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1190" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1190</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tempo-bench): limit receipts retrieval concurrency by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1189" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1189</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(builder): block time metric by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1192" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1192</a></li>
<li data-v>ci: tag nightly manually via workflow input by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1197" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1197</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(builder): gas per second metric division by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1198" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1198</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: maintain the right pool by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1199" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1199</a></li>
<li data-v>ci: default nightly attribute value by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1200" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1200</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(chainspec): add AllegroModerato hardfork by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1193" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1193</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(alloy): move crate docs into readme file by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1204" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1204</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(builder): gauge metrics, less verbose payload built log by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1201" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1201</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: <code data-v>admin_validatorKey</code> by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1205" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1205</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: migrate allegretto docs to tempo repo by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1209" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1209</a></li>
<li data-v>ci: remove bench workflows by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1194" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1194</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add Nix flake by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1206" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1206</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add test for subblock transactions failing to pay fees by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1164" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1164</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add tempoup installer script by @jenpaff in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/889" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/889</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: update docs <code data-v>tempo.ts</code> -> v0.8.3 by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1212" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1212</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(fee-manager): fix <code data-v>set_fee_token</code> post moderato by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1208" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1208</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: point docs at testnet, not devnet by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1215" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1215</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(docs): remove nested <code data-v>docs/.github</code> by @struong in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1214" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1214</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(docs): correct tip20_factory initialize description to reflect actual bahavior by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1210" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1210</a></li>
<li data-v>Rename TxAA &#x26; references to TempoTransaction by @snario in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1171" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1171</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor: support protocol nonces in 2d pool by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1218" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1218</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: camelCase aaAuthList by @jxom in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1224" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1224</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: camelCase aaAuthList by @jxom in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1227" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1227</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add guide for rewards by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1231" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1231</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(stablecoin-exchange): set balance after <code data-v>transfer_from</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1182" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1182</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: remove unused file by @o-az in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1216" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1216</a></li>
<li data-v>deps: bump reth by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1247" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1247</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add tempo-forge script to easily run fuzz tests by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1244" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1244</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add reward docs to tempo sdk, and claude skill for syncing docs changes by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1255" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1255</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: <code data-v>.gitattributes</code> by @o-az in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1243" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1243</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: showcase relayer sponsor in guide by @struong in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1219" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1219</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(faucet): use mint instead of transfer by @Rjected in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1233" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1233</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tip20-factory): check tokenIdCounter in isTIP20 by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1234" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1234</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: make cargo hack pass by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1253" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1253</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: update Abis import snippet by @struong in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1242" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1242</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add sync docs claude command by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1259" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1259</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tip20): skip quote token currency check for zero quote token post-AllegroModerato by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1246" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1246</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: tempo-foundry CI by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1217" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1217</a></li>

<li data-v>chore: guides and demos style cleanup by @gorried in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1265" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1265</a></li>
<li data-v>ci: ignore tests for docs changes by @tmm in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1268" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1268</a></li>

<li data-v>feat(tip20): validate is_tip20 in from_address post-AllegroModerato by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1250" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1250</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(e2e): use <code data-v>TestingNode</code> instead by @joshieDo in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/936" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/936</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add eth config support by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1202" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1202</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(ci): optimize builds by adding a bake file by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1261" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1261</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: update security in readme by @samczsun in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1260" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1260</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: serialize <code data-v>keyId</code> for keychain signatures by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1275" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1275</a></li>

<li data-v>feat(faucet): use random 2d nonce filler in faucet by @Rjected in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1232" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1232</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: support foundry usage patterns with a hack by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1245" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1245</a></li>
<li data-v>docs(tempo-bench): update help doc, add --faucet to quick start by @Rjected in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1240" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1240</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: update <code data-v>reserve_liquidity</code> calculation by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1277" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1277</a></li>

<li data-v>perf: parallelize recovery by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1300" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1300</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump alloy-chains by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1302" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1302</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: set 2d nonces on estimateGas by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1304" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1304</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: launch prep, bump to 0.7.2 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1294" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1294</a></li>

2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2025-12-02T18:57:09Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">December 2, 2025</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v0.7.1 - Allegretto hardfork patches</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This is a patch release that contains fixes for OTLP tracing panics and P2P reliability.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>fix(alloy): 2D nonce filler fill condition by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1163" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1163</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: port docs into tempo repo by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1148" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1148</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): fill and sign transactions before sending by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1167" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1167</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): send AA transactions and use 2D nonces by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1139" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1139</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(tempo-bench): remove filler generic and introduce BenchProvider by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1172" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1172</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(genesis): create PathUSD through factory with address(0) as quote token by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1168" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1168</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(consensus): fill holes when forwarding finalized blocks by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1173" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1173</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add dedicated dev genesis by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1179" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1179</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(consensus): replace <code data-v>follows_from</code> tracing link with <code data-v>parent</code> by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1178" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1178</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.7.0...v0.7.1" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.7.0...v0.7.1</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v0.7.0" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2025-12-01T21:06:35Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">December 1, 2025</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v0.7.0 - Allegretto hardfork</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This is a release that prepares the Andantino testnet for the Allegretto hardfork (timestamp: Wed Dec 3rd 2025 16:00:00 GMT+0000). Please upgrade your nodes before the date to make sure your nodes keep up-to-date.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>fix(tempo-bench): place DEX orders at tick spacing by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1121" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1121</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add allow-unregistered-handshakes cli flag by @laibe in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1125" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1125</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tempo-bench): clear txpool for all URLs and get start block from sent txs by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1123" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1123</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: re-broadcast built subblocks multiple times by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1126" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1126</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add nonce key support for tempo tx request by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1122" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1122</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!: stablecoin exchange overflow error by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1124" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1124</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): add missing FeeManager interface functions and pending fees validation by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1106" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1106</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): simplify storage internals by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1105" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1105</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tempo-sidercar): enable <code data-v>alloy/provider-ws</code> feature by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1143" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1143</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(subblocks): don't rebroadcast subblocks to oursevles by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1146" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1146</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(dkg): add metrics for shares, acks, and dealings by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1042" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1042</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(aa): allow recovered AA authorization lists by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1150" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1150</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: more payload builder defaults by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1147" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1147</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): load-balance transactions between multiple URLs by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1141" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1141</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: fee AMM liqudiity tracker by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1115" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1115</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(alloy): random 2d nonce filler by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1138" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1138</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add <code data-v>burnFrom</code> to TIP-20 by @danrobinson in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1140" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1140</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(stablecoin-exchange): create new dex pair on first order by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/985" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/985</a></li>
<li data-v>Revert "feat: add <code data-v>burnFrom</code> to TIP-20" by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1155" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1155</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(alloy): configure random nonces on provider builder by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1158" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1158</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(consensus): reject proposals, DKG dealings from wrong dealers by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1134" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1134</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: add registry check on mint by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1156" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1156</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(mempool): ensure fee payer is not blacklisted by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1114" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1114</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): account for <code data-v>is_bid</code> in <code data-v>quote_exact_in</code> calc by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1130" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1130</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add Allegretto time to Andantino by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1154" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1154</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: handle refunds in keychain contract by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1166" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1166</a></li>
</ul>
<h2 data-v>New Contributors</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>@laibe made their first contribution in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1125" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1125</a></li>
<li data-v>@danrobinson made their first contribution in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1140" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1140</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.6.1...v0.7.0" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.6.1...v0.7.0</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v0.5.3" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:mb-4">v0.5.3 - Andantino testnet patches</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>chore(e2e): tweak timeouts by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1017" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1017</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(subblocks): propagate subblock feeRecipient to EVM by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1018" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1018</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(deny): apply <code data-v>MIT OR Apache-2.0</code> license to crates by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1024" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1024</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(consensus): retain old epoch information until full transition by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1021" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1021</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(deny): <code data-v>RUSTSEC-2024-0437</code> is no longer relevant by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1025" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1025</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(e2e): bump <code data-v>new_payload_wait_time</code> for subblocks test by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1027" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1027</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: validate blocktime is not in the future by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1001" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1001</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): Update <code data-v>LinkingUSD</code> to use default <code data-v>TIP20</code> logic by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1015" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1015</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump to v0.5.3 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1036" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1036</a></li>
</ul>

vocs:mb-4">v0.5.2 - Andantino testnet patches</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>fix(ci): build docker images on tag by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/979" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/979</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(sidecar): add graceful shutdowns by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/980" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/980</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(chainspec): add Allegretto hardfork by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/976" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/976</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: expose <code data-v>feePayer</code> on RPC receipt by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/984" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/984</a></li>
<li data-v>test(bench): Include DEX orders and swaps in <code data-v>max_tps</code> by @RomanHodulak in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/959" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/959</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: forward common features by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/989" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/989</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(ci): remove snapshot directory, since snapshots are now built correctly by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/998" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/998</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(reth): bump reth version so tracing works correctly by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1000" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1000</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(ci): upload binaries to r2 bucket on release by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1002" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1002</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(reth): bump with txpool p2p fixes by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1003" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1003</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.5.1...v0.5.2" vocs:mb-4">v0.5.1 - Andantino testnet patches</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This is a patch release that prepares the Andantino testnet for the Moderato hardfork (timestamp: Mon Nov 24 2025 16:00:00 GMT+0000). Please upgrade your nodes before the date to make sure your nodes keep up-to-date.</p>
<p data-v>This patch version also includes a fix for better RPC transaction inclusion.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>fix(faucet): send transactions to node's rpc by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/974" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/974</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump reth by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/977" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/977</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v0.5.0" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2025-11-19T16:20:48Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">November 19, 2025</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v0.5.0 - Moderato hardfork on Andantino testnet</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><p data-v>This is a release that prepares the Andantino testnet for the Moderato hardfork (timestamp: <code data-v>Mon Nov 24 2025 16:00:00 GMT+0000</code>). Please upgrade your nodes before the date to make sure your nodes keep up-to-date.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>feat: payload builder defaults by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/938" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/938</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: bump system tx gas limit to 250M by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/945" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/945</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(stablecoin-exchange): align MIN/MAX_PRICE with MIN/MAX_TICK (Moderato+) by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/944" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/944</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(stablecoin-exchange): round up quote amounts (Moderato+) by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/942" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/942</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(orderbook): add price bounds validation to price_to_tick() by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/939" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/939</a></li>
<li data-v>test(bench): Include DEX orders and swaps in <code data-v>max_tps</code> by @RomanHodulak in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/770" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/770</a></li>
<li data-v>Revert "test(bench): Include DEX orders and swaps in <code data-v>max_tps</code> (#770)" by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/958" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/958</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(deps): replace simple-tqdm with indicatif 0.18 to avoid unmaintained number_prefix by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/954" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/954</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(consensus): certificate backfill by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/956" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/956</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: add delegateToDefaultV2 to prevent signature forgery by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/948" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/948</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(reth): persistence by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/957" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/957</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): disable scheduled TIP20 rewards   by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/953" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/953</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): setup transient storage support by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/955" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/955</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump commonware dep by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/964" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/964</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(precompiles): return ABI-encoded UnknownFunctionSelector error (Moderato+) by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/941" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/941</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: ensure executor task is aborted with application by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/967" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/967</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor: pull pagination types into <code data-v>tempo-alloy</code> by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/965" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/965</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: re-use EthBeaconConsensus::validate_header by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/961" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/961</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: release 0.5.0 and add Moderato hardfork to Andantino by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/969" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/969</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.4.0...v0.5.0" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.4.0...v0.5.0</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v0.4.0" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 vocs:mb-4">v0.4.0 - Andantino testnet patches</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>docs(tempo-alloy): add some crate docs by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/828" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/828</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: use adantino as base for dev chain by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/837" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/837</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: only print tempo hardforks by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/841" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/841</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: validate <code data-v>shared_gas_limit</code> by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/834" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/834</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: preparation for next hardfork by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/833" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/833</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: validate system transactions fields by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/836" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/836</a></li>
<li data-v>ci: add snapshot re-execution workflow by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/842" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/842</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(arbbot): add simple metrics by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/851" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/851</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor: unify codepaths for fee token operations by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/824" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/824</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add licenses and basic layout readme by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/825" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/825</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: block withdrawals that would drain liquidity for current transaction by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/789" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/789</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: commonware to c26f028 by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/861" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/861</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!: correct off-by-one in TIP20Factory quote token validation, gate behind Moderato by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/863" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/863</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(<code data-v>README</code>): fix link, add contributing section by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/873" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/873</a></li>
<li data-v>test: add selector coverage validation for all precompile dispatchers by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/727" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/727</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: disable backports into andantino by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/871" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/871</a></li>
<li data-v>nit(docs): change heading level for <code data-v>Contributing</code> section by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/876" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/876</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(ci): add nushell support for benchmark binary by @kuyziss in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/880" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/880</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(tip-fee-manager): prevent LinkingUSD from being set as user token by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/847" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/847</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(precompiles): add reward handling to TIP20 fee transfer functions by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/855" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/855</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(precompiles): emit ActiveKeyCountChanged event in Nonce precompile by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/848" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/848</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(precompiles): deprecate the FeeManager <code data-v>mint()</code> function after the <code data-v>Moderato</code> hardfork by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/867" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/867</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(stablecoin-exchange): add missing book existence check to place_flip by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/845" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/845</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(stablecoin-exchange): validate base token is TIP20 in createPair by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/844" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/844</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: correctly track <code data-v>non_shared_gas_left</code> by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/879" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/879</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(stablecoin-exchange): check maxIn/maxOut only on final swap amount by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/882" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/882</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(deps): bump to revm 33, latest Reth + fix zepter lint by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/878" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/878</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor(chainspec): add is_moderato() helper method by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/894" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/894</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(alloy): re-export <code data-v>tempo-primitives</code> by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/896" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/896</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(stablecoin-exchange): correct unit conversions and avoid rounding in swap order fills by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/890" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/890</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump to 0.4.0 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/899" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/899</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(docs): deploy rust docs to gh pages by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/895" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/895</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add <code data-v>SpecId</code> to <code data-v>TempoHardfork</code> conversion method by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/898" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/898</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: use cargo docs doc_cfg by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/908" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/908</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(ci): use new <code data-v>cargo docs</code> alias by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/911" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/911</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(ci): docs deploy perms by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/915" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/915</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): update TIP20 default suppy cap by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/912" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/912</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): update transfer event <code data-v>from</code> to <code data-v>Address::ZERO</code> on <code data-v>mint_with_memo()</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/913" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/913</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): update <code data-v>transfer_from_with_memo</code> to emit transfer event from <code data-v>call.from</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/914" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/914</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: <code data-v>FeeAMM</code> fixes by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/892" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/892</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: make ci pass by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/918" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/918</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(tip20): remove token from registry when all streams cancelled (Moderato+) by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/917" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/917</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): add insufficient liquidity error to <code data-v>swap_exact_amount_in</code> post <code data-v>Moderato</code> hardfork by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/919" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/919</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: reject transactions without a fee token preference by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/916" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/916</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: set coinbase validator token to LinkingUSD by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/910" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/910</a></li>
<li data-v>test(e2e): implement validator restart and recovery test scenarios by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/783" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/783</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(alloy): re-export <code data-v>tempo-contracts</code> by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/923" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/923</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(ci): nushell pinned version by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/925" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/925</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(ci): disable crate docs publish for now by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/922" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/922</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump reth by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/937" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/937</a></li>
</ul>
<h2 data-v>New Contributors</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>@kuyziss made their first contribution in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/880" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/880</a></li>
</ul>

vocs:mb-4">v0.3.0 - Andantino testnet</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>Andantino testnet launch</h2>
<p data-v>This is the second major release for the first persistent and public Tempo testnet.</p>
<p data-v>All breaking changes will be released with a new major release version and the Andantino testnet is going to be upgraded through a hardfork.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>feat: expose <code data-v>timestampMillis</code> on RPC header by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/757" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/757</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(ci): build all binaries using Dockerfile by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/760" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/760</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!: (precompiles) add missing stablecoin exchange functions by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/765" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/765</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(contracts): update <code data-v>StablecoinExchange</code> getPriceLevel to getTickLevel in interface/dispatch by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/767" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/767</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(fee-manager): add min liquidity to <code data-v>TIPFeeManager</code> dispatch by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/773" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/773</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(linking-usd): disable rewards by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/774" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/774</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!: correct mapping slots by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/761" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/761</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(consensus): relax starting conditions on height mismatch between execution, consensus layers by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/768" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/768</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(download/follow): change defaults to actual testnet values by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/777" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/777</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(transaction-pool): enable serde and reth-codec features in primitives dep by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/779" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/779</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(genesis): add missing AlphaUSD-LinkingUSD liquidity pool and fix token order by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/781" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/781</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(subblocks): forward transactions from RPC to subblocks service by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/780" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/780</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: update fee token checks to match latest spec by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/776" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/776</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: regenerate test genesis, fix tests, and enforce genesis consistency in CI by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/791" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/791</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(revm): remove unused <code data-v>transfer_token</code> function by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/807" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/807</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!: error on none zero tx.value by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/759" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/759</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add tempo binary features and porpagation by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/814" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/814</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: remove --fund-test-accounts flag from generate-genesis by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/813" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/813</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: bump revm patch by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/820" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/820</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: rm reth crate from workspace by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/819" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/819</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(precompiles): storage primitives by @0xrusowsky in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/669" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/669</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: release v0.3.0 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/830" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/830</a></li>
</ul>
<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.2.0...v0.3.0" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.2.0...v0.3.0</a></p></div></div></div></div></article><article id="v0.2.0" class="vocs:relative vocs:flex vocs:gap-8 vocs:md:gap-12 2-2h6"></path></svg></a><time dateTime="2025-11-06T13:26:05Z" class="vocs:text-sm vocs:text-secondary">November 6, 2025</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v0.2.0 - Andantino testnet</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h1 data-v>Andantino testnet launch</h1>
<p data-v>This is the release for the first persistent and public Tempo testnet.</p>
<p data-v>All breaking changes will be released with a new major release version and the Andantino testnet is going to be upgraded through a hardfork.</p>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>chore: handler cleanup and revm bump by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/503" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/503</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: <code data-v>TempoTransactionRequest::calls</code> by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/518" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/518</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(precompiles): restructure precompiles by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/521" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/521</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: add missing txpool arg to <code data-v>just localnet</code> by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/511" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/511</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add missing linkingUSD functions by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/537" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/537</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: more missing linkingusd functions by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/542" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/542</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: Intrinsic gas calculations for AA txs by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/520" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/520</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: Add <code data-v>dex_getOrders</code> endpoint and schema by @RomanHodulak in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/546" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/546</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(node): Launch node with <code data-v>TempoDex</code> RPC module by @RomanHodulak in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/551" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/551</a></li>

<li data-v>feat!(revm): add expanded fee token preference by @Rjected in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/687" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/687</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(consensus): ensure that finalized is always the forkchoice floor by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/714" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/714</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(contracts): update <code data-v>memo</code> in <code data-v>TransferWithMemo</code> to be indexed by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/720" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/720</a></li>
<li data-v>test(tip20_rewards_registry): add unit tests for <code data-v>TIP20RewardsRegistry</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/713" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/713</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(revm): preserve logs even on halt/revert by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/718" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/718</a></li>
<li data-v>chore!: clean up unused Permit struct / permit / DOMAIN_SEPARATOR in TIP20 interface definition by @zerosnacks in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/721" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/721</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(genesis): set initial validator fee token to linking USD by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/717" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/717</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!: add missing view fns by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/723" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/723</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(rpc): return 42424242424242... for balance rpc by @Rjected in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/712" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/712</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: skip fee token validity for eth_calls without fees by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/726" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/726</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(precompiles): add activeOrderId and pendingOrderId dispatch handlers by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/730" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/730</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: rm consts from tip fee manager by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/731" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/731</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!:add missing transfer_from_with_memo to tip20 by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/732" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/732</a></li>
<li data-v>chore!(consensus): Migrate to <code data-v>commonware-consensus</code> epoch helpers by @clabby in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/728" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/728</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: include fee transfer logs for reverting transactions by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/729" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/729</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(fee-manager): Add <code data-v>mintWithValidatorToken</code> to <code data-v>TIPFeeManager</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/725" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/725</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: add missing fn by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/733" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/733</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tip20): update quote token functions, variables and events to match spec by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/735" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/735</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tests): patch flaky gas estimation test by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/736" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/736</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: add <code data-v>userRewardInfo</code> to TIP20 dispatch by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/737" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/737</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: don't overwrite rewards update by @howydev in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/739" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/739</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(precompiles): add <code data-v>finalizeStreams</code> to dispatch for testing by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/740" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/740</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(precompiles): add <code data-v>nextStreamId</code> to <code data-v>TIP20</code> dispatch by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/738" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/738</a></li>
<li data-v>fix!(precompiles): update <code data-v>TIP20</code> interface to pass <code data-v>timestamp</code> to <code data-v>finalizeStreams</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/745" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/745</a></li>
<li data-v>chore!(contracts): remove <code data-v>delegationMessage()</code> from TIPAccountRegistrar interface by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/741" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/741</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: dont clone AccountInfo in get_account_info fn by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/742" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/742</a></li>
<li data-v>chore!(contracts): remove calculate liquidity from the public interface by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/749" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/749</a></li>
<li data-v>ci(Mergify): configuration update by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/750" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/750</a></li>
<li data-v>deps: bump reth by @shekhirin in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/752" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/752</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(ci): disable arm64 docker builds by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/753" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/753</a></li>
<li data-v>chore!: rename receive_role by @mattsse in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/747" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/747</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(node): add testnet chainspec by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/670" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/670</a></li>
<li data-v>feat!(linking-usd): Add <code data-v>TRANSFER_ROLE</code> and <code data-v>RECIEVE_WITH_MEMO_ROLE</code> to dispatch by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/756" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/756</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(cargo): bump version to 0.2.0 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/755" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/755</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: include fee token into RPC transaction receipts by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/754" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/754</a></li>
</ul>
<h2 data-v>New Contributors</h2>

<li data-v>@zerosnacks made their first contribution in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/640" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/640</a></li>
<li data-v>@yongkangc made their first contribution in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/690" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/690</a></li>
<li data-v>@clabby made their first contribution in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/728" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/728</a></li>

vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): handle insufficient balance error in withdraw by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/502" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/502</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): determine trade direction dynamically in quote swap functions by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/501" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/501</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: temporarily use Github native CI by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/505" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/505</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(ci): ubuntu-latest-4 doesn't exist by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/506" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/506</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(dev): add localnet just target by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/472" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/472</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: handle <code data-v>mintWithMemo</code> and <code data-v>burnWithMemo</code> by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/509" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/509</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: refactor fee calc in deduct_caller with helpers by @rakita in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/492" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/492</a></li>
</ul>

vocs:text-secondary">October 17, 2025</time></div><h2 class="vocs:text-2xl vocs:font-semibold vocs:text-heading vocs:mb-4">v0.1.0 - Andante testnet</h2><div class="vocs:relative"><div class="vocs:prose vocs:prose-sm vocs:max-w-none vocs:overflow-hidden vocs:transition-[max-height] vocs:duration-300"><div class="vocs:space-y-6 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:first-child]:mt-0 vocs:[&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0" data-v-content="true"><ul data-v>
<li data-v>test(e2e):  e2e tests (#489)</li>
<li data-v>fix(tempo): activate feature in binary (#487)</li>
<li data-v>fix(revm): webauthn gas calculation (#486)</li>
<li data-v>fix(e2e): comment out nondeterminism check (#485)</li>
<li data-v>feat: Account Abstraction Tx Type (#414)</li>
<li data-v>chore(security): pin deps in build workflow (#479)</li>
<li data-v>fix: don't fail for non-node commands (#484)</li>
</ul>
<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>
<ul data-v>
<li data-v>feat: update dependencies by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1</a></li>
<li data-v>ci: Add build job by @exdx in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: Add integration skeleton by @exdx in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/3" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/3</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: launch node from Cli::run by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/4" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/4</a></li>
<li data-v>Merge cli changes by @exdx in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/5" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/5</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: Fill out State by @exdx in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/7" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/7</a></li>
<li data-v>node: Implement context by @exdx in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/9" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/9</a></li>
<li data-v>Use patched libp2p with hickory-resolver 2.5.2 by @romac in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/10" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/10</a></li>
<li data-v>Run consensus by @exdx in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/11" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/11</a></li>
<li data-v>reorg by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/13" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/13</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: more reorg crates by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/14" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/14</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: BlockHash as Value by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/15" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/15</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(ci): add autobuilds by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/16" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/16</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: restructure into workspace by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/23" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/23</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: move <code data-v>crescendo</code> to <code data-v>tempo-bench</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/24" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/24</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add ansible and terraform for autodeploys by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/22" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/22</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(ci): only deploy on changes in main by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/27" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/27</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: support custom genesis files in chainspec by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/29" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/29</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): multiple node targets by @transmissions11 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/39" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/39</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: precompiled tokens by @transmissions11 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/26" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/26</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: TIP4217 currency registry by @transmissions11 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/45" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/45</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(precompiles): real sig check in permit, imports and other nits by @transmissions11 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/46" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/46</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: update malachite to v0.5.0 by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/42" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/42</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: emit errors with source chains by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/47" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/47</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: modify reth settings and add easier methods for setting up devnet by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/55" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/55</a></li>
<li data-v>ci: use depot runners instead of gha runners by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/54" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/54</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): Expand <code data-v>tempo-bench</code> benchmarking suite by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/40" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/40</a></li>
<li data-v>bench(precompile):  Add benchmarks for TIP403 precompile by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/53" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/53</a></li>
<li data-v>bench(precompile): Add benchmarks for TIP20 precompile by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/51" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/51</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(deps): Pin malachite to <code data-v>0c5a67f</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/50" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/50</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: timeout proposals that take too long by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/58" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/58</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: <code data-v>TempoNode</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/49" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/49</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: enable hardforks by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/63" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/63</a></li>

<li data-v>fix(commonware-node): don't block executor on backfill by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/411" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/411</a></li>
<li data-v>ci(test): run all tests without stopping on first failure by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/422" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/422</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: TIP20 linking token by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/413" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/413</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): ensure linking token is deployed when creating TIP20 tokens by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/424" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/424</a></li>
<li data-v>refactor: Replace custom <code data-v>UnsupportedTxTypeEip4844</code> error by <code data-v>UnsupportedTxType</code> error from <code data-v>alloy</code> by @RomanHodulak in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/425" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/425</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: add <code data-v>admin</code> arg to <code data-v>LinkingUSD</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/427" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/427</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: use generic <code data-v>ChainSpec</code> by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/428" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/428</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): initial stablecoin dex precompile, interface and stub functions by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/429" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/429</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: generate <code data-v>TempoTypedTransaction</code> via macro by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/431" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/431</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): implement two-step linking token update by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/430" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/430</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): implement Order type for stablecoin DEX by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/426" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/426</a></li>
<li data-v>chore: rm <code data-v>address_is_token_address</code> by @onbjerg in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/435" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/435</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(primitives): remove deref of tempo header to eth header by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/436" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/436</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(contracts): add safe factory on genesis by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/437" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/437</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: predeploy Arachnid CREATE2 factory by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/440" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/440</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(tempo-bench): add gas limit cli arg by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/444" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/444</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tempo): make consensus config optional if passing <code data-v>--dev</code> or <code data-v>--no-consensus</code> by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/445" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/445</a></li>
<li data-v>doc(commonware-node): explain backfill from consensus to execution by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/443" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/443</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: update dockerfile to use renamed tempo binary by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/410" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/410</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): implement place and placeFlip functions for stablecoin DEX by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/439" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/439</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(bench): decrease single tx gas limit by 10x by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/448" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/448</a></li>
<li data-v>telemetry(node): prefix all consensus metrics by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/453" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/453</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(bench): update the examples by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/451" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/451</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(deps): update commonware by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/456" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/456</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(clippy): deny systemtime in precompiles by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/447" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/447</a></li>
<li data-v>test(precompiles): extract helper functions for TIP20 linking token tests by @fgimenez in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/452" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/452</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: correctly configure EVM during inspection by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/457" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/457</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(ci): nightly bench by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/432" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/432</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): <code data-v>StablecoinExchange</code> execution logic by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/450" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/450</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(precompiles): update <code data-v>LinkingUSD</code> transfer logic by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/464" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/464</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(rpc): update <code data-v>caller_gas_allowance</code> to divide by gas price by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/468" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/468</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: return precompile errors as reverts by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/473" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/473</a></li>

<li data-v>chore(precompiles): simplify <code data-v>StablecoinExchange</code> logic by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/470" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/470</a></li>
<li data-v>test(precompiles): update <code data-v>StablecoinExchange</code> tests and patch implementation by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/476" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/476</a></li>

<li data-v>feat: add instruction to fetch millisecond timestamp by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/477" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/477</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(ci): add release flow [INF-16] by @Zygimantass in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/463" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/463</a></li>
<li data-v>feat(test): add e2e tests with consensus and execution layers by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/433" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/433</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: don't use system time in Tip20 by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/482" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/482</a></li>
<li data-v>fix: don't fail for non-node commands by @klkvr in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/484" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/484</a></li>
<li data-v>chore(security): pin deps in build workflow by @jxom in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/479" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/479</a></li>
<li data-v>feat: Account Abstraction Tx Type by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/414" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/414</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(e2e): comment out nondeterminism check by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/485" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/485</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(revm): webauthn gas calculation by @legion2002 in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/486" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/486</a></li>
<li data-v>fix(tempo): activate feature in binary by @SuperFluffy in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/487" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/487</a></li>
<li data-v>test(e2e): <code data-v>StablecoinExchange</code> e2e tests by @0xKitsune in <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/489" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/489</a></li>
