<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/commits/v0.1.0" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/commits/v0.1.0</a></p></div></div></div></div></article></div></div></div><script>$RB=[];$RV=function(a){$RT=performance.now();for(var b=0;b<a.length;b+=2){var c=a[b],e=a[b+1];null!==e.parentNode&&e.parentNode.removeChild(e);var f=c.parentNode;if(f){var g=c.previousSibling,h=0;do{if(c&&8===c.nodeType){var d=c.data;if("/$"===d||"/&"===d)if(0===h)break;else h--;else"$"!==d&&"$?"!==d&&"$~"!==d&&"$!"!==d&&"&"!==d||h++}d=c.nextSibling;f.removeChild(c);c=d}while(c);for(;e.firstChild;)f.insertBefore(e.firstChild,c);g.data="$";g._reactRetry&&requestAnimationFrame(g._reactRetry)}}a.length=0};
$RC=function(a,b){if(b=document.getElementById(b))(a=document.getElementById(a))?(a.previousSibling.data="$~",$RB.push(a,b),2===$RB.length&&("number"!==typeof $RT?requestAnimationFrame($RV.bind(null,$RB)):(a=performance.now(),setTimeout($RV.bind(null,$RB),2300>a&&2E3<a?2300-a:$RT+300-a)))):b.parentNode.removeChild(b)};$RC("B:0","S:0")</script><script>(self.__FLIGHT_DATA||=[]).push("2:I[\"df94d8e30fbc\",[],\"Slot\",1]\n3:I[\"78b726323c5e\",[],\"default\",1]\n4:I[\"df94d8e30fbc\",[],\"Children\",1]\n5:I[\"6b066fc78587\",[],\"Provider\",1]\n6:I[\"db6d2bb09299\",[],\"default\",1]\n7:\"$Sreact.suspense\"\n8:I[\"016d4f7f7ddf\",[],\"Skeleton\",1]\n9:I[\"016d4f7f7ddf\",[],\"Changelog\",1]\n4f:I[\"b199a6ed78e9\",[],\"Head\",1]\n50:I[\"19197d212366\",[],\"Root_client\",1]\n51:I[\"25e3fbcd185e\",[],\"ScrollRestoration\",1]\na:Ta48,> [!IMPORTANT]\r\n> **This release is required for the T1C network upgrade with the following activation times:**\r\n> - Moderato: Monday, March 9th at 16:00 CET (unix timestamp: 1773068400)\r\n> - Mainnet: Thursday, March 12th at 16:00 CET (unix timestamp: 1773327600)\r\n> \r\n> **Node operators must update before activation, otherwise nodes will fall out of sync with the network.**\r\n>\r\n> This release includes a breaking keychain-signature migration at T1C (only `V2`signatures and hashes accepted post T1C).\r\n\r\n\r\n## Libraries & Tools\r\n\r\n- **foundry**: use v1.6.0-t1c (`foundryup -n tempo -i v1.6.0-t1c`)\r\n- **tempo-alloy**: pin the dependency to v1.4.0\r\n- **pytempo**: use v0.3.1\r\n- **tempo-go**: use 0.3.0\r\n- **viem**: use 2.47.0\r\n\r\n## Breaking Changes\r\n\r\n- **Migrated Keychain Signatures from legacy to V2:** pre-T1C only legacy keychain signatures (`V1`) are accepted, post-T1C only keychain signatures `V2` (`type 0x04`) are accepted. Pre T1C keys will continue to be accessible, only the signature type and hash calculations have changed.\r\n- **KeyAuthorization wildcard removed post-T1C:** `chain_id=0` is no longer valid after activation; key authorizations must use the exact Tempo chain ID.\r\n- **Precompile fork boundary update:** precompiles switch from Prague to Osaka at T1C.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n\r\n- Added `t1c` hardfork support in chainspec/genesis and activation wiring ([#2860](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2860)).\r\n- Bumped precompile set from Prague to Osaka at T1C ([#2809](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2809)).\r\n- Added keychain signature V2 support and hardfork-aware validation gates ([#2867](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2867)).\r\n- Enforced strict post-T1C key authorization `chain_id` checks (no wildcard) ([#2871](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2871)).\r\n- Moved keychain and fee/reserve checks to the T1C boundary ([#2861](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2861), [#2862](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2862), [#2866](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2866), [#2870](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2870)).\r\n- Improved txpool expiry/key tracking cleanup and paused-pool handling ([#2874](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2874), [#2878](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2878)).\r\n- Added checkpoint-guarded atomic rollback protection for batched precompile state mutations ([#2879](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2879)).\r\n- Fixed fee-payer whitelist integration test coverage for T1C behavior ([#2875](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2875)).\r\n\r\nFull Changelog: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.1...v1.4.0\r\n\r\n\r\nb:Tf92,<aside data-v-callout data-v-context=\"info\" data-v data-v-content><div data-v-callout-icon><svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"1em\" height=\"1em\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"/><path d=\"M12 16v-4\"/><path d=\"M12 8h.01\"/></svg></div>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>This release is required for the T1C network upgrade with the following activation times:</strong></p>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>Moderato: Monday, March 9th at 16:00 CET (unix timestamp: 1773068400)</li>\n<li data-v>Mainnet: Thursday, March 12th at 16:00 CET (unix timestamp: 1773327600)</li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Node operators must update before activation, otherwise nodes will fall out of sync with the network.</strong></p>\n<p data-v>This release includes a breaking keychain-signature migration at T1C (only <code data-v>V2</code>signatures and hashes accepted post T1C).</p>\n</aside>\n<h2 data-v>Libraries &#x26; Tools</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>foundry</strong>: use v1.6.0-t1c (<code data-v>foundryup -n tempo -i v1.6.0-t1c</code>)</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>tempo-alloy</strong>: pin the dependency to v1.4.0</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>pytempo</strong>: use v0.3.1</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>tempo-go</strong>: use 0.3.0</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>viem</strong>: use 2.47.0</li>\n</ul>\n<h2 data-v>Breaking Changes</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>Migrated Keychain Signatures from legacy to V2:</strong> pre-T1C only legacy keychain signatures (<code data-v>V1</code>) are accepted, post-T1C only keychain signatures <code data-v>V2</code> (<code data-v>type 0x04</code>) are accepted. Pre T1C keys will continue to be accessible, only the signature type and hash calculations have changed.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>KeyAuthorization wildcard removed post-T1C:</strong> <code data-v>chain_id=0</code> is no longer valid after activation; key authorizations must use the exact Tempo chain ID.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>Precompile fork boundary update:</strong> precompiles switch from Prague to Osaka at T1C.</li>\n</ul>\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>Added <code data-v>t1c</code> hardfork support in chainspec/genesis and activation wiring (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2860\" data-v>#2860</a>).</li>\n<li data-v>Bumped precompile set from Prague to Osaka at T1C (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2809\" data-v>#2809</a>).</li>\n<li data-v>Added keychain signature V2 support and hardfork-aware validation gates (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2867\" data-v>#2867</a>).</li>\n<li data-v>Enforced strict post-T1C key authorization <code data-v>chain_id</code> checks (no wildcard) (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2871\" data-v>#2871</a>).</li>\n<li data-v>Moved keychain and fee/reserve checks to the T1C boundary (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2861\" data-v>#2861</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2862\" data-v>#2862</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2866\" data-v>#2866</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2870\" data-v>#2870</a>).</li>\n<li data-v>Improved txpool expiry/key tracking cleanup and paused-pool handling (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2874\" data-v>#2874</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2878\" data-v>#2878</a>).</li>\n<li data-v>Added checkpoint-guarded atomic rollback protection for batched precompile state mutations (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2879\" data-v>#2879</a>).</li>\n<li data-v>Fixed fee-payer whitelist integration test coverage for T1C behavior (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2875\" data-v>#2875</a>).</li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v>Full Changelog: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.1...v1.4.0\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.1...v1.4.0</a></p>c:T4f4,<p data-v>This patch release includes security hardening for expiring nonce replay protection and keychain precompile gas handling activated with T1A/T1B network upgrade. <strong data-v>It is required for all node operators to upgrade.</strong></p>\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v>fix: harden expiring nonce replay protection: Strengthens replay protection for expiring nonce transactions by using a hash derivation that is invariant to fee payer changes.</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v>fix: update keychain precompile gas metering: Corrects gas accounting for keychain-authorized transactions to prevent double-charging, and ensures nonce is always properly incremented.</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v>fix(evm): reset initial_gas in execution_result and catch_error: Fixes gas state handling in EVM error and result paths to ensure correct gas reporting.</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v>feat: raise per-transaction gas limit on testnet: Removal of EIP-7825's 16.7M per-transaction gas limit cap, raising it to Tempo's 30M cap</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0</a></p>d:T81d,This patch release includes fixes for stablecoin DEX error handling, RPC gas estimation, transaction pool validation, and improved consensus peer management. We recommend all node operators upgrade.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n\r\n- **fix(stablecoin-dex): propagate system errors on `place_flip()`** by [@0xrusowsky](https://github.com/0xrusowsky) in [#2654](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2654): System errors (like out-of-gas, arithmetic panics, or DB errors) from `place_flip()` calls were being silently swallowed. This fix ensures they are properly propagated.\r\n- **fix(evm): use TIP_FEE_MANAGER_ADDRESS as RPC simulation beneficiary** by [@0xrusowsky](https://github.com/0xrusowsky) in [#2672](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2672): Amends the RPC gas estimation fix from v1.1.3 â `Address::ZERO` didn't work as the sentinel beneficiary because genesis maps `validatorTokens[Address::ZERO]` to a `\"DONOTUSE\"` token, triggering liquidity errors. This switches to `TIP_FEE_MANAGER_ADDRESS` which correctly falls back to the default fee token.\r\n- **fix(txpool): mark system/fee payer sig errors as invalid txs** by [@fgimenez](https://github.com/fgimenez) in [#2652](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2652): Transactions with invalid system or fee payer signatures were not being correctly marked as invalid in the pool. They are now properly rejected.\r\n- **refactor(consensus): move peer tracking to self standing actor** by [@SuperFluffy](https://github.com/SuperFluffy) in [#2617](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2617): Prepares peer management for TIP-1017 by moving it to a standalone actor that can track finalized blocks for peer set changes.\r\n- **feat(storage): add block_number() to PrecompileStorageProvider trait** by [@howydev](https://github.com/howydev) in [#2667](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2667): Adds `block_number()` to the storage provider trait, needed by ValidatorConfigV2 to track `addedAtHeight`/`deactivatedAtHeight`.\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: [v1.1.3...v1.1.4](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.3...v1.1.4)e:Ta71,<p data-v>This patch release includes fixes for stablecoin DEX error handling, RPC gas estimation, transaction pool validation, and improved consensus peer management. We recommend all node operators upgrade.</p>\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(stablecoin-dex): propagate system errors on <code data-v>place_flip()</code></strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/0xrusowsky\" data-v>@0xrusowsky</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2654\" data-v>#2654</a>: System errors (like out-of-gas, arithmetic panics, or DB errors) from <code data-v>place_flip()</code> calls were being silently swallowed. This fix ensures they are properly propagated.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(evm): use TIP_FEE_MANAGER_ADDRESS as RPC simulation beneficiary</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/0xrusowsky\" data-v>@0xrusowsky</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2672\" data-v>#2672</a>: Amends the RPC gas estimation fix from v1.1.3 â <code data-v>Address::ZERO</code> didn't work as the sentinel beneficiary because genesis maps <code data-v>validatorTokens[Address::ZERO]</code> to a <code data-v>\"DONOTUSE\"</code> token, triggering liquidity errors. This switches to <code data-v>TIP_FEE_MANAGER_ADDRESS</code> which correctly falls back to the default fee token.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(txpool): mark system/fee payer sig errors as invalid txs</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/fgimenez\" data-v>@fgimenez</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2652\" data-v>#2652</a>: Transactions with invalid system or fee payer signatures were not being correctly marked as invalid in the pool. They are now properly rejected.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>refactor(consensus): move peer tracking to self standing actor</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/SuperFluffy\" data-v>@SuperFluffy</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2617\" data-v>#2617</a>: Prepares peer management for TIP-1017 by moving it to a standalone actor that can track finalized blocks for peer set changes.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>feat(storage): add block_number() to PrecompileStorageProvider trait</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/howydev\" data-v>@howydev</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2667\" data-v>#2667</a>: Adds <code data-v>block_number()</code> to the storage provider trait, needed by ValidatorConfigV2 to track <code data-v>addedAtHeight</code>/<code data-v>deactivatedAtHeight</code>.</li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.3...v1.1.4\" data-v>v1.1.3...v1.1.4</a></p>f:Ta60,This patch release includes several important fixes for gas estimation, transaction pool eviction, and account abstraction transaction handling, along with improved peer discovery and installer reliability. We recommend all node operators upgrade.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n\r\n- **fix(chainspec): set explicit tx_gas_limit_cap for T0/Genesis to prevent EIP-7825 fallback** by [@gakonst](https://github.com/gakonst) in [#2649](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2649): `eth_estimateGas` was broken on mainnet â returning `intrinsic gas too high` for all calls without an explicit gas limit. The root cause was that T0/Genesis returned `None` for `tx_gas_limit_cap()`, causing revm to fall back to EIP-7825's protocol default of 2Â²â´ (~16.7M), which capped the binary search and triggered validation failures. This fix sets an explicit gas limit cap for T0/Genesis.\r\n- **fix(evm): use default fee token for RPC gas estimation to avoid validator token mismatch** by [@fgimenez](https://github.com/fgimenez) in [#2588](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2588): Gas estimation via RPC could fail when the validator's configured fee token differed from the caller's. This fix uses the default fee token for RPC gas estimation, ensuring consistent results regardless of validator configuration.\r\n- **fix(alloy): preserve key_authorization in build_aa and route AA txs in SignableTxRequest** by [@fgimenez](https://github.com/fgimenez) in [#2598](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2598): Account abstraction transactions could lose their `key_authorization` field during construction, causing them to be rejected. This fix preserves the field and correctly routes AA transactions through `SignableTxRequest`.\r\n- **fix(txpool): cache key auth expiry for pool eviction** by [@fgimenez](https://github.com/fgimenez) in [#2637](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2637): Transactions with expiring key authorizations were not being evicted from the pool after expiry. The transaction pool now caches and checks key auth expiry for proper eviction.\r\n- **feat: enable discv5 by default** by [@Rjected](https://github.com/Rjected) in [#2634](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2634): Discovery v5 is now enabled by default, improving peer discovery and network connectivity.\r\n- **feat(p2p): add more default bootnodes for mainnet and testnet** by [@Zygimantass](https://github.com/Zygimantass) in [#2231](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2231): Adds additional default boot nodes for both mainnet and testnet, improving initial peer connectivity.\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: [v1.1.2...v1.1.3](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.2...v1.1.3)10:Tcc3,<p data-v>This patch release includes several important fixes for gas estimation, transaction pool eviction, and account abstraction transaction handling, along with improved peer discovery and installer reliability. We recommend all node operators upgrade.</p>\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(chainspec): set explicit tx_gas_limit_cap for T0/Genesis to prevent EIP-7825 fallback</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/gakonst\" data-v>@gakonst</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2649\" data-v>#2649</a>: <code data-v>eth_estimateGas</code> was broken on mainnet â returning <code data-v>intrinsic gas too high</code> for all calls without an explicit gas limit. The root cause was that T0/Genesis returned <code data-v>None</code> for <code data-v>tx_gas_limit_cap()</code>, causing revm to fall back to EIP-7825's protocol default of 2Â²â´ (~16.7M), which capped the binary search and triggered validation failures. This fix sets an explicit gas limit cap for T0/Genesis.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(evm): use default fee token for RPC gas estimation to avoid validator token mismatch</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/fgimenez\" data-v>@fgimenez</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2588\" data-v>#2588</a>: Gas estimation via RPC could fail when the validator's configured fee token differed from the caller's. This fix uses the default fee token for RPC gas estimation, ensuring consistent results regardless of validator configuration.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(alloy): preserve key_authorization in build_aa and route AA txs in SignableTxRequest</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/fgimenez\" data-v>@fgimenez</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2598\" data-v>#2598</a>: Account abstraction transactions could lose their <code data-v>key_authorization</code> field during construction, causing them to be rejected. This fix preserves the field and correctly routes AA transactions through <code data-v>SignableTxRequest</code>.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>fix(txpool): cache key auth expiry for pool eviction</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/fgimenez\" data-v>@fgimenez</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2637\" data-v>#2637</a>: Transactions with expiring key authorizations were not being evicted from the pool after expiry. The transaction pool now caches and checks key auth expiry for proper eviction.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>feat: enable discv5 by default</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/Rjected\" data-v>@Rjected</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2634\" data-v>#2634</a>: Discovery v5 is now enabled by default, improving peer discovery and network connectivity.</li>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>feat(p2p): add more default bootnodes for mainnet and testnet</strong> by <a href=\"https://github.com/Zygimantass\" data-v>@Zygimantass</a> in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2231\" data-v>#2231</a>: Adds additional default boot nodes for both mainnet and testnet, improving initial peer connectivity.</li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.2...v1.1.3\" data-v>v1.1.2...v1.1.3</a></p>11:T689,## v1.1.1 - T1 (Bach) Mainnet Network Upgrade\r\n\r\n> [!IMPORTANT]\r\n> **This release is required for the Bach (T1) mainnet network upgrade scheduled for Thursday, Feb 12th 2026 16:00 CET.** Node operators must update their nodes, otherwise your nodes will fall out of sync with the network. This release focuses on mainnet-ready gas economics, expiring nonces, and security hardening from recent audits.\r\n\r\nThe Bach (T1) network upgrade implements three major TIPs:\r\n- [TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000)\r\n- [TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009)\r\n- [TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010)\r\n\r\n### Security & Bug Fixes\r\n\r\n- Addresses security findings from audits hardening access keys, DEX, and transaction pool correctness: : [#2528](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2528), [#2522](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2522), [#2553](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2553), [#2521](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2521), [#2496](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2496), [#2513](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2513)\r\n- Fixes `tempo download` defaulting to testnet, `tempoup` GPG verification for older versions, expiring nonce handling in `eth_fillTransaction`, and genesis nonce key gas charging: [#2587](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2587), [#2557](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2557), [#2491](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2491), [#2573](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2573)\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: [v1.1.0...v1.1.1](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1)12:T9e2,<h2 data-v>v1.1.1 - T1 (Bach) Mainnet Network Upgrade</h2>\n<aside data-v-callout data-v-context=\"info\" data-v data-v-content><div data-v-callout-icon><svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"1em\" height=\"1em\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"/><path d=\"M12 16v-4\"/><path d=\"M12 8h.01\"/></svg></div>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>This release is required for the Bach (T1) mainnet network upgrade scheduled for Thursday, Feb 12th 2026 16:00 CET.</strong> Node operators must update their nodes, otherwise your nodes will fall out of sync with the network. This release focuses on mainnet-ready gas economics, expiring nonces, and security hardening from recent audits.</p>\n</aside>\n<p data-v>The Bach (T1) network upgrade implements three major TIPs:</p>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000\" data-v>TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase</a></li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009\" data-v>TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces</a></li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010\" data-v>TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters</a></li>\n</ul>\n<h3 data-v>Security &#x26; Bug Fixes</h3>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>Addresses security findings from audits hardening access keys, DEX, and transaction pool correctness: : <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2528\" data-v>#2528</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2522\" data-v>#2522</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2553\" data-v>#2553</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2521\" data-v>#2521</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2496\" data-v>#2496</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2513\" data-v>#2513</a></li>\n<li data-v>Fixes <code data-v>tempo download</code> defaulting to testnet, <code data-v>tempoup</code> GPG verification for older versions, expiring nonce handling in <code data-v>eth_fillTransaction</code>, and genesis nonce key gas charging: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2587\" data-v>#2587</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2557\" data-v>#2557</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2491\" data-v>#2491</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2573\" data-v>#2573</a></li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1\" data-v>v1.1.0...v1.1.1</a></p>13:T20a4,> [!IMPORTANT]\r\n> **This release is required for the Bach (T1) network upgrade scheduled for Thursday, Feb 5th 2026 16:00 CET.** Node operators must update their nodes, otherwise your nodes will fall out of sync with the network. This release focuses on mainnet-ready gas economics, expiring nonces, and security hardening from recent audits. \r\n\r\nThe Bach (T1) network upgrade implements three major TIPs:\r\n- [TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000)\r\n- [TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009)\r\n- [TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010)\r\n\r\nThis release includes breaking changes on the CLI, precompile interface, please read the release notes carefully.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Network Upgrade Changes\r\n\r\n### TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase\r\n\r\nTempo's high throughput makes it vulnerable to state growth attacks where adversaries could create terabytes of permanent state at low cost. [TIP-1000](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000) increases state creation costs by 12.5x, making such attacks economically infeasible (~$50M to create 1TB of state). Transfers to new addresses now cost ~300k gas (was ~70k), and contract deployments cost 5-10x more.\r\n\r\n| Operation | Before | After |\r\n|-----------|--------|-------|\r\n| New state element (SSTORE zero â non-zero) | 20,000 gas | 250,000 gas |\r\n| Account creation (first nonce write) | 0 gas | 250,000 gas |\r\n| Contract creation per byte | 200 gas | 1,000 gas |\r\n| Contract creation base (keccak + codesize) | included | 500,000 gas |\r\n| Transaction gas cap | 16M gas | 30M gas |\r\n\r\n### TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces\r\n\r\nTraditional sequential nonces create friction for gasless transactions and parallel submission. If transaction N fails, all subsequent transactions are blocked. Additionally, 2D nonces (nonce keys) can lead to permanent state bloat since unused nonce keys are stored forever. [TIP-1009](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009) introduces expiring nonces: Transactions specify a `validBefore` timestamp (max 30s in future) instead of a sequential nonce. A fixed-size circular buffer (300k entries) automatically evicts expired entries, preventing state growth. This enables relayers to submit multiple transactions in parallel without complex nonce management, while eliminating the state bloat attack vector.\r\n\r\n([#2121](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2121)): Time-bounded replay protection using transaction hashes. Transactions use `nonceKey = uint256.max` with `validBefore` timestamp (max 30s in future). Enables gasless/meta-transactions and parallel submission.\r\n\r\n### TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters\r\n\r\n[TIP-1010](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010) calibrates Tempo's mainnet gas parameters, balancing high throughput with sustainable fee levels. The base fee increase to 20 gwei maintains the target of ~0.1 cent per TIP-20 transfer while providing better spam protection. The 500M block gas limit ensures sufficient capacity for payment transactions.\r\n\r\n([#2194](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2194)):\r\n\r\n| Parameter | Before | After |\r\n|-----------|--------|-------|\r\n| Base fee | 10 gwei | 20 gwei |\r\n| Total block gas limit | - | 500M gas |\r\n| General gas limit | - | 30M gas/block |\r\n\r\n## New Features\r\n- [Unified Telemetry Configuration](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2172): New `--telemetry-url <URL>` flag configures metrics and logs export in a single option. Pushes both reth and consensus metrics with a `consensus_id` label for node identification. **We ask all validators to configure the `--telemetry-url` so we can support troubleshooting**.\r\n- [Separate Consensus Storage Directory](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2288): New `--consensus.datadir <PATH>` flag allows validators to store consensus data on a separate volume (e.g., AWS EBS) while keeping execution state on high-performance local disks. Migrate by copying `<datadir>/consensus` to the new location.\r\n- [Validator Info CLI Command](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2179): New `consensus validators-info` subcommand\r\n- [Validator Health Dashboard](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2267): New Grafana dashboard for validator monitoring\r\n- [Fee Payer Signature Support](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2283): `TempoTransactionRequest` supports `fee_payer_signature`\r\n- [Expiring Nonce Setters](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2266): Added `valid_before`/`valid_after` setters to `TempoTransactionRequest`\r\n\r\n## Breaking Changes\r\n\r\n### CLI Changes\r\n\r\n- **Testnet Chain Name:** Testnet nodes must now use `--chain moderato`. The previous `andantino` chainspec has been removed. Update node startup scripts and systemd services accordingly ([#1876](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1876), introduced in v1.0.0)\r\n\r\n- **CLI Force Flag:** `--delete-signing-share` now requires `--force` flag to prevent accidental deletion of validator signing keys. Update any automation scripts that manage validator key lifecycle ([#2215](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2215)).\r\n\r\n### Precompile Interface Changes\r\n\r\n- **Precompile Revert Behavior:** Precompiles now revert with a standard error (instead of returning a precompile-specific error) when calldata is less than 4 bytes (missing function selector). This aligns precompile behavior with regular Solidity contracts. Update `try/catch` blocks and test assertions that expected the old error type ([#2083](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2083)).\r\n\r\n- **ValidatorConfig Signature Change:** `changeValidatorStatus(address, bool)` now takes a `uint64 index` instead of address. This prevents front-running attacks where a malicious validator could rotate their address before deactivation. Callers must now look up the validator's index in the validator array ([#2188](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2188)).\r\n\r\n### Access Key / Keychain Changes\r\n\r\n- **Keychain Signature Validation:** Signature type (secp256k1, secp256r1, etc.) must now match the `key_type` stored when the key was authorized. This closes a security gap where a key authorized for one curve could potentially be used with a different signature scheme. Transactions with mismatched types are rejected at the mempool level ([#2178](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2178)).\r\n\r\n### Gas Economics (T1 Network Upgrade)\r\n\r\n- **2D Nonce Key Gas (TIP-1000):** Accessing an existing 2D nonce key now costs 5,000 gas (was 0). Update gas estimates for transactions using 2D nonces ([#2362](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2362)).\r\n\r\n- **Developer Action Required:** The gas cost changes in TIP-1000 and TIP-1010 (see tables above) require updating `gas_limit` values in your configuration, `estimateGas()` calls, and any hardcoded `gasPrice` or `maxFeePerGas` values in scripts and transaction builders.\r\n\r\n## Security Fixes\r\n\r\n- [Signature Type Validation](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2178): Verifies signature type matches `key_type`, closing a security gap where authorized keys could potentially be used with a different signature scheme.\r\n- [ValidatorConfig Front-running Fix](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2188): Uses validator index instead of address in `changeValidatorStatus` to prevent malicious validators from evading deactivation by rotating addresses.\r\n- [Transaction Pool DoS Hardening](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2358): Multiple fixes to prevent eviction-based DoS attacks ([#2352](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2352), [#2327](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2327), [#2216](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2216), [#2242](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2242), [#2183](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2183), [#2167](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2167))\r\n- [Checkpoint Revert on Key Authorization OOG](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2329): Properly reverts state on out-of-gas during key authorization.\r\n- [Reject Expired Access Keys](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2223): Mempool rejects transactions with expired access keys.\r\n- [Reject Paused TIP20 Tokens](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2041): Prevents fee validation bypass using paused tokens.\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: [v1.0.2...v1.1.0](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.2...v1.1.0)14:T2ca8,<aside data-v-callout data-v-context=\"info\" data-v data-v-content><div data-v-callout-icon><svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"1em\" height=\"1em\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"/><path d=\"M12 16v-4\"/><path d=\"M12 8h.01\"/></svg></div>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>This release is required for the Bach (T1) network upgrade scheduled for Thursday, Feb 5th 2026 16:00 CET.</strong> Node operators must update their nodes, otherwise your nodes will fall out of sync with the network. This release focuses on mainnet-ready gas economics, expiring nonces, and security hardening from recent audits.</p>\n</aside>\n<p data-v>The Bach (T1) network upgrade implements three major TIPs:</p>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000\" data-v>TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase</a></li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009\" data-v>TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces</a></li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010\" data-v>TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters</a></li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v>This release includes breaking changes on the CLI, precompile interface, please read the release notes carefully.</p>\n<hr data-v>\n<h2 data-v>Network Upgrade Changes</h2>\n<h3 data-v>TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase</h3>\n<p data-v>Tempo's high throughput makes it vulnerable to state growth attacks where adversaries could create terabytes of permanent state at low cost. <a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1000\" data-v>TIP-1000</a> increases state creation costs by 12.5x, making such attacks economically infeasible (~$50M to create 1TB of state). Transfers to new addresses now cost ~300k gas (was ~70k), and contract deployments cost 5-10x more.</p>\n<div data-v-table-wrapper><table data-v>\n<thead data-v>\n<tr data-v>\n<th data-v>Operation</th>\n<th data-v>Before</th>\n<th data-v>After</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody data-v>\n<tr data-v>\n<td data-v>New state element (SSTORE zero â non-zero)</td>\n<td data-v>20,000 gas</td>\n<td data-v>250,000 gas</td>\n</tr>\n<tr data-v>\n<td data-v>Account creation (first nonce write)</td>\n<td data-v>0 gas</td>\n<td data-v>250,000 gas</td>\n</tr>\n<tr data-v>\n<td data-v>Contract creation per byte</td>\n<td data-v>200 gas</td>\n<td data-v>1,000 gas</td>\n</tr>\n<tr data-v>\n<td data-v>Contract creation base (keccak + codesize)</td>\n<td data-v>included</td>\n<td data-v>500,000 gas</td>\n</tr>\n<tr data-v>\n<td data-v>Transaction gas cap</td>\n<td data-v>16M gas</td>\n<td data-v>30M gas</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table></div>\n<h3 data-v>TIP-1009: Expiring Nonces</h3>\n<p data-v>Traditional sequential nonces create friction for gasless transactions and parallel submission. If transaction N fails, all subsequent transactions are blocked. Additionally, 2D nonces (nonce keys) can lead to permanent state bloat since unused nonce keys are stored forever. <a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1009\" data-v>TIP-1009</a> introduces expiring nonces: Transactions specify a <code data-v>validBefore</code> timestamp (max 30s in future) instead of a sequential nonce. A fixed-size circular buffer (300k entries) automatically evicts expired entries, preventing state growth. This enables relayers to submit multiple transactions in parallel without complex nonce management, while eliminating the state bloat attack vector.</p>\n<p data-v>(<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2121\" data-v>#2121</a>): Time-bounded replay protection using transaction hashes. Transactions use <code data-v>nonceKey = uint256.max</code> with <code data-v>validBefore</code> timestamp (max 30s in future). Enables gasless/meta-transactions and parallel submission.</p>\n<h3 data-v>TIP-1010: Mainnet Gas Parameters</h3>\n<p data-v><a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/tips/tip-1010\" data-v>TIP-1010</a> calibrates Tempo's mainnet gas parameters, balancing high throughput with sustainable fee levels. The base fee increase to 20 gwei maintains the target of ~0.1 cent per TIP-20 transfer while providing better spam protection. The 500M block gas limit ensures sufficient capacity for payment transactions.</p>\n<p data-v>(<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2194\" data-v>#2194</a>):</p>\n<div data-v-table-wrapper><table data-v>\n<thead data-v>\n<tr data-v>\n<th data-v>Parameter</th>\n<th data-v>Before</th>\n<th data-v>After</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody data-v>\n<tr data-v>\n<td data-v>Base fee</td>\n<td data-v>10 gwei</td>\n<td data-v>20 gwei</td>\n</tr>\n<tr data-v>\n<td data-v>Total block gas limit</td>\n<td data-v>-</td>\n<td data-v>500M gas</td>\n</tr>\n<tr data-v>\n<td data-v>General gas limit</td>\n<td data-v>-</td>\n<td data-v>30M gas/block</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table></div>\n<h2 data-v>New Features</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2172\" data-v>Unified Telemetry Configuration</a>: New <code data-v>--telemetry-url &#x3C;URL></code> flag configures metrics and logs export in a single option. Pushes both reth and consensus metrics with a <code data-v>consensus_id</code> label for node identification. <strong data-v>We ask all validators to configure the <code data-v>--telemetry-url</code> so we can support troubleshooting</strong>.</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2288\" data-v>Separate Consensus Storage Directory</a>: New <code data-v>--consensus.datadir &#x3C;PATH></code> flag allows validators to store consensus data on a separate volume (e.g., AWS EBS) while keeping execution state on high-performance local disks. Migrate by copying <code data-v>&#x3C;datadir>/consensus</code> to the new location.</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2179\" data-v>Validator Info CLI Command</a>: New <code data-v>consensus validators-info</code> subcommand</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2267\" data-v>Validator Health Dashboard</a>: New Grafana dashboard for validator monitoring</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2283\" data-v>Fee Payer Signature Support</a>: <code data-v>TempoTransactionRequest</code> supports <code data-v>fee_payer_signature</code></li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2266\" data-v>Expiring Nonce Setters</a>: Added <code data-v>valid_before</code>/<code data-v>valid_after</code> setters to <code data-v>TempoTransactionRequest</code></li>\n</ul>\n<h2 data-v>Breaking Changes</h2>\n<h3 data-v>CLI Changes</h3>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Testnet Chain Name:</strong> Testnet nodes must now use <code data-v>--chain moderato</code>. The previous <code data-v>andantino</code> chainspec has been removed. Update node startup scripts and systemd services accordingly (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1876\" data-v>#1876</a>, introduced in v1.0.0)</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>CLI Force Flag:</strong> <code data-v>--delete-signing-share</code> now requires <code data-v>--force</code> flag to prevent accidental deletion of validator signing keys. Update any automation scripts that manage validator key lifecycle (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2215\" data-v>#2215</a>).</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<h3 data-v>Precompile Interface Changes</h3>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Precompile Revert Behavior:</strong> Precompiles now revert with a standard error (instead of returning a precompile-specific error) when calldata is less than 4 bytes (missing function selector). This aligns precompile behavior with regular Solidity contracts. Update <code data-v>try/catch</code> blocks and test assertions that expected the old error type (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2083\" data-v>#2083</a>).</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>ValidatorConfig Signature Change:</strong> <code data-v>changeValidatorStatus(address, bool)</code> now takes a <code data-v>uint64 index</code> instead of address. This prevents front-running attacks where a malicious validator could rotate their address before deactivation. Callers must now look up the validator's index in the validator array (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2188\" data-v>#2188</a>).</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<h3 data-v>Access Key / Keychain Changes</h3>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><strong data-v>Keychain Signature Validation:</strong> Signature type (secp256k1, secp256r1, etc.) must now match the <code data-v>key_type</code> stored when the key was authorized. This closes a security gap where a key authorized for one curve could potentially be used with a different signature scheme. Transactions with mismatched types are rejected at the mempool level (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2178\" data-v>#2178</a>).</li>\n</ul>\n<h3 data-v>Gas Economics (T1 Network Upgrade)</h3>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>2D Nonce Key Gas (TIP-1000):</strong> Accessing an existing 2D nonce key now costs 5,000 gas (was 0). Update gas estimates for transactions using 2D nonces (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2362\" data-v>#2362</a>).</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Developer Action Required:</strong> The gas cost changes in TIP-1000 and TIP-1010 (see tables above) require updating <code data-v>gas_limit</code> values in your configuration, <code data-v>estimateGas()</code> calls, and any hardcoded <code data-v>gasPrice</code> or <code data-v>maxFeePerGas</code> values in scripts and transaction builders.</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<h2 data-v>Security Fixes</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2178\" data-v>Signature Type Validation</a>: Verifies signature type matches <code data-v>key_type</code>, closing a security gap where authorized keys could potentially be used with a different signature scheme.</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2188\" data-v>ValidatorConfig Front-running Fix</a>: Uses validator index instead of address in <code data-v>changeValidatorStatus</code> to prevent malicious validators from evading deactivation by rotating addresses.</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2358\" data-v>Transaction Pool DoS Hardening</a>: Multiple fixes to prevent eviction-based DoS attacks (<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2352\" data-v>#2352</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2327\" data-v>#2327</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2216\" data-v>#2216</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2242\" data-v>#2242</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2183\" data-v>#2183</a>, <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2167\" data-v>#2167</a>)</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2329\" data-v>Checkpoint Revert on Key Authorization OOG</a>: Properly reverts state on out-of-gas during key authorization.</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2223\" data-v>Reject Expired Access Keys</a>: Mempool rejects transactions with expired access keys.</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2041\" data-v>Reject Paused TIP20 Tokens</a>: Prevents fee validation bypass using paused tokens.</li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.2...v1.1.0\" data-v>v1.0.2...v1.1.0</a></p>15:T7ba,This release updates Reth depdendency to `v1.10.1` and revm to `v34.0.0`, bringing improvements to snapshot syncing and validator performance.\r\n\r\n## Highlights\r\n\r\n### Improvements\r\n\r\n- [Reth v1.10.1 Upgrade](https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/releases/tag/v1.10.1): Engine optimization for validator node sync performance: Explicitly requests head block download after backfill to prevent stalls ([reth#21150](https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/pull/21161))\r\n- Resumable Snapshot Downloads: More reliable snapshot syncing with auto-retry support, improving sync reliability on unstable connections ([reth#21161](https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/pull/21150))\r\n- [Revm v34.0.0](https://github.com/bluealloy/revm/releases/tag/v103): Latest EVM execution improvements and alloy-evm compatibility\r\n\r\n### New Features\r\n- New `consensus_getIdentityTransitionProof` RPC method (#1918): Retrieve identity transition proofs with DKG outcomes and BLS certificates for network identity changes. Supports querying from specific epochs and retrieving full history back to genesis.\r\n\r\n### What's Changed\r\n- feat: v1.0.1 release by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2165\r\n- fix(specs): account for ceiling rounding in PlaceOrder fuzz test bound by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2146\r\n- feat: add consensus_getIdentityTransitionProof by @joshieDo in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1918\r\n- fix(test): use correct PRICE_SCALE in StablecoinDEX fuzz test by @gakonst in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2174\r\n- feat: bump revm v34.0.0 by @rakita in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1762\r\n- chore: v1.0.2 by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2182\r\n- chore: bump reth to v1.10.1 by @rakita in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2186\r\n- chore: update reth to tmp branch by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2193\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.1...v1.0.216:Tbb1,<p data-v>This release updates Reth depdendency to <code data-v>v1.10.1</code> and revm to <code data-v>v34.0.0</code>, bringing improvements to snapshot syncing and validator performance.</p>\n<h2 data-v>Highlights</h2>\n<h3 data-v>Improvements</h3>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/releases/tag/v1.10.1\" data-v>Reth v1.10.1 Upgrade</a>: Engine optimization for validator node sync performance: Explicitly requests head block download after backfill to prevent stalls (<a href=\"https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/pull/21161\" data-v>reth#21150</a>)</li>\n<li data-v>Resumable Snapshot Downloads: More reliable snapshot syncing with auto-retry support, improving sync reliability on unstable connections (<a href=\"https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/pull/21150\" data-v>reth#21161</a>)</li>\n<li data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/bluealloy/revm/releases/tag/v103\" data-v>Revm v34.0.0</a>: Latest EVM execution improvements and alloy-evm compatibility</li>\n</ul>\n<h3 data-v>New Features</h3>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>New <code data-v>consensus_getIdentityTransitionProof</code> RPC method (#1918): Retrieve identity transition proofs with DKG outcomes and BLS certificates for network identity changes. v1.0.0-rc.6\r\n\r\n`v1.0.0-rc.6` fixes a bug in the syncing process for block producing nodes. We recommend that Moderato block producers upgrade to this release whenever convenient.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* test(primitives): ensure webauthn injection is not possible by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2038\r\n* feat: FeeAMM & FeeManager invariant testing by @zerosnacks in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2025\r\n* refactor(revm): replace AccessKeyAuthorizationFailed with concrete error types by @rakita in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2040\r\n* feat(tips): TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase by @dankrad in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2034\r\n* feat(tempo-bench): use Secp256k1Signer for better signing performance by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2052\r\n* feat(tips): TIP-1003: client order IDs by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2023\r\n* feat(tips): TIP-1002: prevent crossed orders by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2022\r\n* docs: add TIP-1004 for permit() on TIP-20 by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2024\r\n* docs: tweaks by @tmm in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2019\r\n* feat(tips): TIP-1005: fix ask swap rounding loss by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2029\r\n* feat(tips): TIP-1001: place-only mode for next quote token by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2021\r\n* docs: add dynamic SEO metadata to all pages by @juandolealt in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2018\r\n* refactor(executor): remove fill_holes backfill logic by @joshieDo in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2056\r\n* chore: rc6 by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2059\r\n* chore: pin GitHub Actions to full-length commit SHAs by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2050\r\n\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.5...v1.0.0-rc.61e:Td0e,<h2 data-v>Release v1.0.0-rc.6</h2>\n<p data-v><code data-v>v1.0.0-rc.6</code> fixes a bug in the syncing process for block producing nodes. We recommend that Moderato block producers upgrade to this release whenever convenient.</p>\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>test(primitives): ensure webauthn injection is not possible by @0xrusowsky in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2038\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2038</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat: FeeAMM &#x26; FeeManager invariant testing by @zerosnacks in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2025\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2025</a></li>\n<li data-v>refactor(revm): replace data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1000: State Creation Cost Increase by @dankrad in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2034\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2034</a></li>\n<li data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2052</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1003: client order IDs by @danrobinson in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2023\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2023</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1002: prevent crossed orders by @danrobinson in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2022\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2024</a></li>\n<li data-v>docs: tweaks by @tmm in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2019\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2019</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat(tips): TIP-1005: fix ask swap rounding loss by @danrobinson in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2029\" href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.5...v1.0.0-rc.6\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.5...v1.0.0-rc.6</a></p>1f:Tdf5,This release is the next candidate for the Moderato and Mainnet networks.\r\n\r\n## Highlights\r\n\r\n### Fixes\r\n- Payload builder timestamp validation: Aligned timestamp validation logic with the handler to prevent edge-case block rejections (#2017)\r\n- Fixed ulimit unlimited bash-specific behavior in tempo.nu to improve cross-shell support (#2016)\r\n- Fixed webauth signature validation (#2036)\r\n\r\n**All RPC nodes operators should update their nodes as soon as possible**\r\n\r\n### Improvements\r\n- CI optimization: Separated test building and execution for faster CI feedback (#2015)\r\n- E2E test stability: Configured timeouts and fixed the restart-after-snapshot test (#2013)\r\n- Code cleanup: Simplified size functions (#1965)\r\n\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* fix(docs): bump viem, wagmi to fix sponsored transaction guide by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1972\r\n* fix: revert 1950, re-enable snapshot execution tests by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1978\r\n* fix(specs): cache order values before calling `_clearTickBit` by @onbjerg in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1933\r\n* fix(precompiles): array packing never spans slot boundary by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1964\r\n* fix(tip20): require root tokens quote token to be `address(0)` by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1980\r\n* feat(rpc): remove dex_, policy_ and amm_ RPC namespaces by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1991\r\n* fix(rpc): disable local pending block by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1982\r\n* fix(precompiles): `FromWord` impl for `FixedBytes` by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1967\r\n* Move and update spec template from outdated docs repo by @dankrad in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1912\r\n* fix(revm): ensure that adjusted gas isn't above the gas limit before by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1987\r\n* feat(genesis): add mainnet gas token support by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1988\r\n* fix! : access keys from 7702 delegating accounts by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1990\r\n* Revert \"fix(revm): ensure that adjusted gas isn't above the gas limit before\" by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2001\r\n* feat(chainspec): add T0 hardfork with security fixes by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2002\r\n* fix! : apply 1987 fixes with T0 hardfork gating by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2008\r\n* chore: 1.0.0-rc.4 by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1998\r\n* fix(tempo.nu): ulimit unlimited is a bash-ism by @DaniPopes in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2016\r\n* chore(e2e): config to timeout and pass restart-after-snapshot test by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2013\r\n* chore: simplify size functions by @DaniPopes in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1965\r\n* feat(ci): separate test building and running by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2015\r\n* test: stablecoin DEX invariant tests by @grandizzy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1924\r\n* fix(payload-builder): align timestamp validation with handler by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2017\r\n* feat: `robots.txt` + gsc by @o-az in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1919\r\n* chore(primitives): cleanup by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2036\r\n\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.3...v1.0.0-rc.520:T16ea,<p for the Moderato and Mainnet networks.\r\n\r\nIt contains bug fixes for:\r\n- double metrics reporting from the consensus engine\r\n- crash on startup when synced from snapshot\r\n- default download URL for downloading snapshots on Moderato\r\n\r\nWe recommend that node operators and validators upgrade as soon as possible.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* Fix node guide links by @snario in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1886\r\n* test(precompiles): add coverage for fee AMM and account keychain by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1947\r\n* fix(genesis): make the validator address logic simpler by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1857\r\n* chore(precompiles): add `fn is_initialized` to `StorageContract` by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1957\r\n* docs: links to moderato in readme by @snario in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1963\r\n* chore(docs): bump viem to 2.44.0 by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1951\r\n* fix(consensus): exit epochs after DKGs are concluded by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1960\r\n* fix(consensus): prune state segments only after reading them first by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1966\r\n* chore: bump rc to 3 by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1968\r\n* test(transaction-pool): improve test quality and coverage by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1930\r\n* feat(snapshot): use moderato as default download url by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1969\r\n\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.2...v1.0.0-rc.322:Tb05,<p data-v>This is another release candidate for We strongly recommend that node operators who are on the Moderato testnet upgrade as soon as possible.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* chore(precompiles): add `FixedBytes` storage test by @zerosnacks in href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1952\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1952</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix(tip20): prevent cycles in quote token updates for <code data-v>pathUSD</code> by @0xrusowsky in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1950\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1950</a></li>\n<li data-v>test(primitives + payload): increase unit test coverage by @0xrusowsky in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1920\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1920</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix(txpool): respect size href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1958\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1958</a></li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.1...v1.0.0-rc.2\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.0.0-rc.1...v1.0.0-rc.2</a></p>25:T4a89,This release launches the Moderato testnet, replacing the original Andantino testnet (will be deprecated March 8th, 2025). Moderato closely mirrors the mainnet release candidate with improved infrastructure and reliability. `v1.0.0-rc.1` comes with major improvements on node operator UX, focuses on stabilization and bug fixes.\r\n\r\n## Migration Required\r\n\r\nIf you were using the Tempo testnet before January 8th, 2025, see the Network Upgrades documentation for migration steps. Update RPC URL to https://rpc.moderato.tempo.xyz and Chain ID to 42431. See [our docs](https://docs.tempo.xyz/network-upgrades) for more detailed information.\r\n\r\n**Node operators:** Please note the `--follow` flag currently defaults to the old Andantino RPC. Pass the Moderato URL explicitly until the next release:\r\n```bash\r\n--follow wss://rpc.moderato.tempo.xyz\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Breaking Changes\r\n\r\nThis release removes all previous hardfork logic and updates to the latest commonware version (PR #1928).\r\n\r\n- **Consolidated DEX Events:** OrderPlaced and FlipOrderPlaced events are now consolidated into a single OrderPlaced event with isFlipOrder and flipTick fields. For regular orders, isFlipOrder is false and flipTick is 0.\r\n\r\n- **Consistent Naming:** Stablecoin Exchange â Stablecoin DEX: All references to \"stablecoin exchange\" have been renamed to \"stablecoin DEX\" for consistency.\r\n\r\n- **TIP20 Deployment Scheme:** Token addresses now include the deployer in the address calculation, preventing front-running attacks on token deployments (PR #1819).\r\n\r\n- **TIPFeeManager API:** Removed get_fee_token_balance() to prevent misleading balance queries. Use balanceOf on the TIP20 token directly (PR #1874).\r\n\r\n## Features\r\n\r\nThis release brings major improvements for node operators and network security. Nodes can now near-instantly start syncing from the network tip (fast sync), dramatically reducing time-to-sync for new or recovering validators. Additionally, the network can now refresh its cryptographic identity when validators change (re-DKG), eliminating historical key material and strengthening security.\r\n\r\n- **Fast Sync:** Validators will skip to the network tip without finalizing every block in between if they fell too many epochs behind. Security is maintained by verifying all network identities at epoch boundaries. This works without operator intervention (PR #1822).\r\n\r\n- **Snapshot sync:** Validators can now join a network from a snapshot. If a trusted snapshot is provided at startup, the node will read the latest available network identity instead of syncing from genesis (PR #1838).\r\n\r\n- **Re-DKG:** added a trigger to the validator-config precompile to generate a new network identity via the DKG mechanism. This invalidates historic threshold key shares and addresses the toxic waste problem (PR #1821, #1680).\r\n\r\n- **Consensus RPC:** Added consensus_ RPC namespace for querying finalization status and subscribing to consensus events (PR #1868).\r\n\r\n- **TIP20 Pending Rewards:** Added getPendingRewards view function to query claimable rewards without state change (PR #1632).\r\n\r\n- **Stablecoin DEX:** Increased minimum order amount for stablecoin DEX orders (PR #1802).\r\n\r\n## Bug Fixes\r\n\r\nThis release includes security hardening (DOS prevention, gas calculation fixes) and correctness improvements for contract deployments and DEX operations.\r\n\r\n- PR #1888+ PR #1899: Drop transactions above gas budget to prevent DOS attacks\r\n- PR #1792: Fixed contract address calculations for CREATE operations; addresses now correctly match receipt contractAddress\r\n- PR #1851: Fixed unnecessary protocol nonce bumping on CREATE revert when using 2D nonces\r\n- PR #1941: Fixed multicall gas calculation in revm handler that was over-refunding gas\r\n- PR #1936: Fixed FeeAMM to handle zero amounts gracefully\r\n- PR #1903: Updated DEX reference implementation to round up escrow amounts\r\n- PR #1932: Fixed allocator initialization\r\n\r\n\r\n## Full Changelog\r\n* chore: rename bench.nu to tempo.nu by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1698\r\n* feat(docs): add validator guide by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1559\r\n* chore(llm): add amp tools for tempo.nu by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1704\r\n* feat(docs): allegro moderato  by @jenpaff in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1653\r\n* Fix the Artemis Tempo link by @akegaviar in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1584\r\n* feat: implement PostHog custom event tracking for docs by @juandolealt in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1687\r\n* chore(deps): run cargo shear by @DaniPopes in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.8.1...v1.0.0-rc126:T7915,<p data-v>This release launches the Moderato testnet, replacing the original Andantino testnet (will be deprecated March 8th, 2025). Moderato closely mirrors the mainnet release candidate with improved infrastructure and reliability. <code data-v>v1.0.0-rc.1</code> comes with major improvements on node operator UX, focuses on stabilization and bug fixes.</p>\n<h2 data-v>Migration Required</h2>\n<p data-v>If you were using the Tempo testnet before January 8th, 2025, see the Network Upgrades documentation for migration steps. Update RPC URL to <a href=\"https://rpc.moderato.tempo.xyz\" data-v>https://rpc.moderato.tempo.xyz</a> and Chain ID to 42431. See <a href=\"https://docs.tempo.xyz/network-upgrades\" data-v>our docs</a> for more detailed information.</p>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Node operators:</strong> Please note the <code data-v>--follow</code> flag currently defaults to the old Andantino RPC. Pass the Moderato URL explicitly until the next release:</p>\n<pre data-v><code class=\"language-bash\" data-v>--follow wss://rpc.moderato.tempo.xyz\n</code></pre>\n<h2 data-v>Breaking Changes</h2>\n<p data-v>This release removes all previous hardfork logic and updates to the latest commonware version (PR #1928).</p>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Consolidated DEX Events:</strong> OrderPlaced and FlipOrderPlaced events are now consolidated into a single OrderPlaced event with isFlipOrder and flipTick fields. For regular orders, isFlipOrder is false and flipTick is 0.</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Consistent Naming:</strong> Stablecoin Exchange â Stablecoin DEX: All references to \"stablecoin exchange\" have been renamed to \"stablecoin DEX\" for consistency.</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>TIP20 Deployment Scheme:</strong> Token addresses now include the deployer in the address calculation, preventing front-running attacks on token deployments (PR #1819).</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>TIPFeeManager API:</strong> Removed get_fee_token_balance() to prevent misleading balance queries. Use balanceOf on the TIP20 token directly (PR #1874).</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<h2 data-v>Features</h2>\n<p data-v>This release brings major improvements for node operators and network security. Nodes can now near-instantly start syncing from the network tip (fast sync), dramatically reducing time-to-sync for new or recovering validators. Additionally, the network can now refresh its cryptographic identity when validators change (re-DKG), eliminating historical key material and strengthening security.</p>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Fast Sync:</strong> Validators will skip to the network tip without finalizing every block in between if they fell too many epochs behind. Security is maintained by verifying all network identities at epoch boundaries. This works without operator intervention (PR #1822).</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Snapshot sync:</strong> Validators can now join a network from a snapshot. If a trusted snapshot is provided at startup, the node will read the latest available network identity instead of syncing from genesis (PR #1838).</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Re-DKG:</strong> added a trigger to the validator-config precompile to generate a new network identity via the DKG mechanism. This invalidates historic threshold key shares and addresses the toxic waste problem (PR #1821, #1680).</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Consensus RPC:</strong> Added consensus_ RPC namespace for querying finalization status and subscribing to consensus events (PR #1868).</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>TIP20 Pending Rewards:</strong> Added getPendingRewards view function to query claimable rewards without state change (PR #1632).</p>\n</li>\n<li data-v>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Stablecoin DEX:</strong> Increased minimum order amount for stablecoin DEX orders (PR #1802).</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<h2 data-v>Bug Fixes</h2>\n<p data-v>This release includes security hardening (DOS prevention, gas calculation fixes) and correctness improvements for contract deployments and DEX operations.</p>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>PR #1888+ PR #1899: Drop transactions above gas budget to prevent DOS attacks</li>\n<li data-v>PR #1792: Fixed contract address calculations for CREATE operations; addresses now correctly match receipt contractAddress</li>\n<li data-v>PR #1851: Fixed unnecessary protocol nonce bumping on CREATE revert when using 2D nonces</li>\n<li data-v>PR #1941: Fixed multicall gas calculation in revm handler that was over-refunding gas</li>\n<li data-v>PR #1936: Fixed FeeAMM to handle zero amounts gracefully</li>\n<li data-v>PR #1903: Updated DEX reference implementation to round up escrow amounts</li>\n<li data-v>PR #1932: Fixed allocator initialization</li>\n</ul>\n<h2 data-v>Full Changelog</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>chore: rename bench.nu to tempo.nu by @shekhirin in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1698\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1698</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat(docs): add validator guide by @Zygimantass in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1559\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1559</a></li>\n<li data-v>chore(llm): add amp tools for data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.8.1...v1.0.0-rc1</a></p>27:T3e19,> [!IMPORTANT]\r\n> **DO NOT** run this binary version on Andantino testnet. This release is meant for the Moderato network, and will corrupt an Andantino node's database.\r\n\r\nThis is the release for the mainnet candidate and Moderato network. It contains removals of hardforks from the Andantino testnet, includes other security and performance improvements.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* chore: rename bench.nu to tempo.nu by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1698\r\n* feat(docs): add validator guide by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1559\r\n* chore(llm): add amp tools for tempo.nu by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1704\r\n* feat(docs): allegro moderato  by @jenpaff in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1653\r\n* Fix the Artemis Tempo link by @akegaviar in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1584\r\n* feat: implement PostHog custom event tracking for docs by @juandolealt in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1687\r\n* chore(deps): run cargo shear by @DaniPopes in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1691\r\n* feat(xtask): move generate-signing-key to consensus subcmd by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1551\r\n* Add `stable` Docker tag for tag-triggered builds by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1737\r\n* fix: propagate features correctly by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1731\r\n* fix: clean-up 2d nonce pool tracker by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1738\r\n* chore: add RUSTSEC-2025-0137 to deny.toml by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1745\r\n* feat!(consensus): remove all pre-allegretto logic by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1671\r\n* Partition `cargo hack check` into 2 CI matrix jobs by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1748\r\n* docs: add dRPC in Developer tools by @joshitzko in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1747\r\n* docs: add theta and path USD to fee token guide by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1754\r\n* docs: Tempo Transaction guide in nav by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1756\r\n* chore: bump commonware to 4a5fca0 by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1678\r\n* fix(stablecoin-exchange): use centralized price conversion functions  by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1763\r\n* faucet fix by @malleshpai in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1771\r\n* fix(docs): correct safe deployer repo by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1728\r\n* fix: catch slot collisions when using `base_slot` attrib by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1777\r\n* fix: support UP/UV validation sigs to always accept UV=1 by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1652\r\n* refactor!(consensus): standardize dkg with upstream commonware by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1759\r\n* chore!: bump commonware to v0.0.64 by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1778\r\n* feat!: remove hardfork logic by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1707\r\n* feat(tip20): add getPendingRewards view function to query claimable rewards without state change by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1632\r\n* fix(precompiles): reject zero public key in ValidatorConfig to prevent non-existent validators by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1630\r\n* feat(consensus): backfill missing execution layer blocks by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1781\r\n* perf(orderbook): optimize tick bitmap traversal using word-level bit manipulation by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1622\r\n* perf: remove redundant balance read in transfer by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1793\r\n* fix(stablecoin-exchange): use consistent rounding for bid order cancel refunds by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1795\r\n* fix(specs): update reference implementation of stablecoin DEX by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1796\r\n* fix(rpc): mitigate subblock tx DoS via early validator filtering and increased channel capacity by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1628\r\n* fix: add pause check to transfer_fee_pre_tx by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1799\r\n* fix: validator fee tracking by token by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1798\r\n* fix: update auth checks when claiming rewards by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1800\r\n* Bump commonware to d16c7481c72cf6f19b77e1435f1e5dd8e32a1aac by @kamsz in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1804\r\n* feat: increase min order amount for stable dex orders by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1802\r\n* fix: add revert if policy doesn't exist by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1801\r\n* docs: remove outdated pending swaps claim from burn function by @yongkangc in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1810\r\n* feat: add new MintWithValidatorToken event with  field by @howydev in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1466\r\n* fix(dex): have flip orders only draw from internal balances by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1806\r\n* fix(specs): function to cancel stale order by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1794\r\n* fix(executor): propagate fork choice update errors  by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1774\r\n* docs(specs): change DEX pair storage layout to be order-sensitive by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1791\r\n* fix(specs): check 403 policy on both tokens in stablecoin DEX by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1805\r\n* chore: remove compact https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1876\r\n* feat!(precompiles): add public getters to `ValidatorConfig` precompile to match spec impl by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1878\r\n* chore(feeAMM): align spec with rust implementation, remove unused custom errors by @zerosnacks in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1904\r\n* chore(precompiles): remove `sqrt` from `FeeAMM.sol` spec, make `sqrt` private test helper, remove unused `SQRT_SCALE` constant by @zerosnacks in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1879\r\n* chore(consensus): remove unused `--consensus.delete-sigining-share` by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1905\r\n* fix(subblock): [validation] drop txs above gas budget by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1899\r\n* chore: bump alloy-chains with tempo moderato by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1906\r\n* feat: add `consensus_` namespace to RPC by @joshieDo in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1868\r\n* test(e2e): reactivate ignored subblocks test by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1862\r\n* chore(precompiles): match against `SolCall` enum by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1890\r\n* fix(consensus/p2p): enable private ip connections by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1911\r\n* test(specs): always check event emission order regardless of isTempo by @onbjerg in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1908\r\n* feat: Add info note on fee atomicity by @gorried in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1897\r\n* chore!(consensus): bump commonware to latest main by @SuperFluffy in `bincode` by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1916\r\n* feat!: consolidtate `OrderPlaced`, `FlipOrderPlaced` events by @0xKitsune in `evm` crate by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1892\r\n* chore: fix genesis generation in Justfile and tempo.nu by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1931\r\n* data-v-context=\"info\" data-v data-v-content><div data-v-callout-icon><svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"1em\" height=\"1em\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"/><path d=\"M12 16v-4\"/><path d=\"M12 8h.01\"/></svg></div>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>DO NOT</strong> run this binary version on Andantino testnet. This release is meant for the Moderato network, and will corrupt an Andantino node's database.</p>\n</aside>\n<p data-v>This is the release for the mainnet candidate and Moderato network. It contains removals of hardforks from the Andantino testnet, includes other security and performance improvements.</p>\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>chore: rename bench.nu to tempo.nu by @shekhirin in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1698\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1698</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat(docs): add validator guide by @Zygimantass in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1559\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1559</a></li>\n<li data-v>chore(llm): add amp tools for tempo.nu by @Zygimantass
