data-v>This release primarily contains fixes for various RPC endpoints</p>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>chore: serialize <code data-v>chainId</code> and <code data-v>expiry</code> as hex in eth_estimateGas by @legion2002 in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1683\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1683</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix: fill correct 2d nonce in <code data-v>eth_fillTransaction</code> by @klkvr in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1684\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1684</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix: swap fillers by @klkvr in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1699\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1699</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix: correctly estimate 2d nonce gas by @klkvr in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1700\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1700</a></li>\n</ul>\n<p data-v>All RPC nodes operators are encouraged to update their nodes as soon as possble</p>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1</a></p>2a:T2177,> [!IMPORTANT]\r\n> **This release is required for the Allegro Moderato hardfork scheduled for Dec 22nd 4pm CET.**. We ask node operators to upgrade to this release to follow the hard fork. This hardfork focus is on security and simplifications from our recent audits and internal reviews in the road to mainnet.\r\n\r\nThis release includes a [Reth upgrade](https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/releases/tag/untagged-e558a55ab46e0d26f90a) with improved performance. \r\n\r\nThe Allegro Moderato hardfork is primarily focused on removing system transactions and moving to immediate execution for both fee swaps and stablecoin DEX orders. This simplifies the architecture and improves efficiency. There are also important security fixes around spending limits and TIP20 validation. See all changes labelled [F-allegro-moderato](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pulls?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Apr+label%3AF-allegro-moderato)\r\n\r\nHere's what's coming in this hardfork:\r\n\r\n## Architectural changes \r\n\r\n[Immediate Fee Swaps](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1537) : Removes the end-of-block fee manager system transaction. Fee swaps now execute immediately during transaction execution, with fees accumulating in the FeeManager. Validators claim accumulated fees on-demand via `distributeFees()`. FeeSwap events are not emitted for immediate swaps.\r\n\r\n[Immediate Stablecoin DEX Orders](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1509): Orders are added to the active book immediately when `place()` or `place_flip()` is called, removing the need for the stablecoin DEX system transaction.\r\n\r\n## Fixes\r\n[Spending Limits Enforcement](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1558) : Fixed spending limits to only apply to `tx.origin` spends, not contract transfers. This prevents failures when an EOA with access keys calls a contract that transfers tokens. Uses transient storage to pass `tx.origin` to precompiles.\r\n\r\n[TIP20 Fee Application Scope](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1337): Limited which TIP20 functions trigger fee rules.\r\n\r\n[TIP20 Token Validation](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1250): Validates `is_tip20` in `from_address` post-hardfork to ensure only valid TIP20 tokens are used.\r\n\r\n\r\n[Fix `setFeeToken` to allow PathUSD](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1208): Fixed the `setFeeToken()` function on the TIPFeeManager to allow PathUSD to be set as the fee token.\r\n\r\n\r\nGas schedule updates\r\n[Gas Schedule & Nonces](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1442): Fixed 2D nonce gas schedule\r\n[Access Keys](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1413) : Added gas schedule for access keys\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* feat: add local benchmarking setup with nushell script by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1502\r\n* fix: expect errors in snippet by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1524\r\n* feat: --delete-signing-share to delete signing share on startup by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1527\r\n* Update favicon, og-image by @achalvs in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1382\r\n* feat(builder): instrumented state provider by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1483\r\n* chore: add fallback favicon by @o-az in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1531\r\n* fix: disallow precompile static calls by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1517\r\n* feat: add `nonce` management guide by @gorried in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1526\r\n* fix(bench): bench.nu samply and node args escaping by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1529\r\n* feat(cli): `--builder.disable-state-cache` by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1532\r\n* ci: use all cores for snapshot re-execution by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1475\r\n* feat: add `MetadataDatabase` by @joshieDo in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1029\r\n* fix: precompile CI by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1543\r\n* chore: Cargo.toml patch reth deps, bench.nu debug profile  by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1545\r\n* fix: make cursor work properly when query spans more than one orderbook by @Rjected in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1223\r\n* chore(storage): no need to load account for tload/tstore by @rakita in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1467\r\n* docs: filter out unsupported injected wallets by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1538\r\n* fix(precompiles): enforce TIP20 blacklist on internal balance operations in StablecoinExchange by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1289\r\n* docs: point to Privy example by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1560\r\n* chore: trim dependencies by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1547\r\n* chore: introduce `reth` feature for `tempo-primitives` by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1562\r\n* feat(consensus): finalize DKG speculatively by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1477\r\n* feat(precompiles): remove stablecoin dex system tx by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1509\r\n* feat(fee-manager): remove fee manager system tx by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1537\r\n* test: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1535\r\n* chore: bump vocs to 1.4.0 by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1646\r\n* ci: unpin solc version now that patch has been released by fix(test): add am hardfork to pregenerated genesis by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1664\r\n* fix(stablecoin-exchange): consolidate rounding with explicit direction to favor protocol by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1583\r\n* fix(revm): validate validator fee token preference to prevent user DoS by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1615\r\n* test: prove storage layout slot allocation fix by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1654\r\n* feat: refactor env variables to https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1634\r\n* fix: devnet wagmi config by @bpierre in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1676\r\n* docs: tabulate faucet options by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1677\r\n\r\n## New Contributors\r\n* @achalvs made their first contribution in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1382\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.7.5...v0.8.02b:T35e0,<aside data-v-callout data-v-context=\"info\" data-v data-v-content><div data-v-callout-icon><svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"1em\" height=\"1em\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"/><path d=\"M12 16v-4\"/><path d=\"M12 8h.01\"/></svg></div>\n<p data-v><strong data-v>This release is required for the Allegro Moderato hardfork scheduled for Dec 22nd 4pm CET.</strong>. We ask node operators to upgrade to this release to follow the hard fork. This hardfork focus is on security and simplifications from our recent audits and internal reviews in the road to mainnet.</p>\n</aside>\n<p data-v>This release includes a <a href=\"https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/releases/tag/untagged-e558a55ab46e0d26f90a\" data-v>Reth upgrade</a> with improved performance.</p>\n<p data-v>The Allegro Moderato hardfork is primarily focused on removing system transactions and moving to immediate execution for both fee swaps and stablecoin DEX orders. This simplifies the architecture and improves efficiency. There are also important security fixes around spending limits and TIP20 validation. See all changes labelled <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pulls?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Apr+label%3AF-allegro-moderato\" data-v>F-allegro-moderato</a></p>\n<p data-v>Here's what's coming in this hardfork:</p>\n<h2 data-v>Architectural changes</h2>\n<p data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1537\" data-v>Immediate Fee Swaps</a> : Removes the end-of-block fee manager system transaction. Fee swaps now execute immediately during transaction execution, with fees accumulating in the FeeManager. Validators claim accumulated fees on-demand via <code data-v>distributeFees()</code>. FeeSwap events are not emitted for immediate swaps.</p>\n<p data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1509\" data-v>Immediate Stablecoin DEX Orders</a>: Orders are added to the active book immediately when <code data-v>place()</code> or <code data-v>place_flip()</code> is called, removing the need for the stablecoin DEX system transaction.</p>\n<h2 data-v>Fixes</h2>\n<p data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1558\" data-v>Spending Limits Enforcement</a> : Fixed spending limits to only apply to <code data-v>tx.origin</code> spends, not contract transfers. This prevents failures when an EOA with access keys calls a contract that transfers tokens. Uses transient storage to pass <code data-v>tx.origin</code> to precompiles.</p>\n<p data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1337\" data-v>TIP20 Fee Application Scope</a>: Limited which TIP20 functions trigger fee rules.</p>\n<p data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1250\" data-v>TIP20 Token Validation</a>: Validates <code data-v>is_tip20</code> in <code data-v>from_address</code> post-hardfork to ensure only valid TIP20 tokens are used.</p>\n<p data-v><a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1208\" data-v>Fix <code data-v>setFeeToken</code> to allow PathUSD</a>: Fixed the <code data-v>setFeeToken()</code> function on the TIPFeeManager to allow PathUSD to be set as the fee token.</p>\n<p data-v>Gas schedule updates\r\n<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1442\" data-v>Gas Schedule &#x26; Nonces</a>: Fixed 2D nonce gas schedule\r\n<a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1413\" data-v>Access Keys</a> : Added gas schedule for access keys</p>\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\n<ul data-v>\n<li data-v>feat: add local benchmarking setup with nushell script by @shekhirin in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1502\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1502</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix: expect errors in snippet by @struong in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1524\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1524</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat: --delete-signing-share to delete signing share on startup by @SuperFluffy in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1527\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1527</a></li>\n<li data-v>Update favicon, og-image by @achalvs in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1382\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1382</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat(builder): instrumented state provider by @shekhirin in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1483\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1483</a></li>\n<li data-v>chore: add fallback favicon by @o-az in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1531\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1531</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix: disallow precompile static calls by @0xKitsune in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1517\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1517</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat: add <code data-v>nonce</code> management guide by @gorried in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1526\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1526</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix(bench): bench.nu samply and node args escaping by @shekhirin in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1529\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1529</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat(cli): <code data-v>--builder.disable-state-cache</code> by @shekhirin in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1532\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1532</a></li>\n<li data-v>ci: use all cores for snapshot re-execution by @shekhirin in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1475\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1475</a></li>\n<li data-v>feat: add <code data-v>MetadataDatabase</code> by @joshieDo in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1029\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1029</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix: precompile CI by @legion2002 in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1543\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1543</a></li>\n<li data-v>chore: Cargo.toml patch reth deps, bench.nu debug profile  by @shekhirin in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1545\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1545</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix: make cursor work properly when query spans more than one orderbook by @Rjected in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1223\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1223</a></li>\n<li data-v>chore(storage): no need to load account for tload/tstore by @rakita in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1467\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1467</a></li>\n<li data-v>docs: filter out unsupported injected wallets by @struong in <a href=\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1538\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1538</a></li>\n<li data-v>fix(precompiles): enforce TIP20 blacklist on internal balance https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1451\r\n* feat: pyroscope by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1454\r\n* feat(precompiles)!: migrate to new API by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1177\r\n* perf(pool): prepare `TempoTxEnv` on validation by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1461\r\n* fix: address connector overflow by @struong in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1460\r\n* fix: validate deployed TIP20 tokens in tip_fee_manager and fix factory test by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1375\r\n* fix(precompiles): check OOB in `Vec<T>::at(index)` by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1469\r\n* perf: use clone into by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1470\r\n* fix: use address for keyId in keychain events by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1416\r\n* fix: use correct createX deployed bytecode by @howydev in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1271\r\n* feat(builder): normal/subblock transactions metrics by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1452\r\n* fix: derive abi for `IAccountKeychain` by @zerosnacks in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1476\r\n* fix: reorder transfer events for mint/burn with memo by @howydev in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1479\r\n* chore: update default genesis generator gas limit to 500mgas by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1480\r\n* feat(tempo-bench): change default TIP-20 transfer weight to 1 by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1486\r\n* chore: remove 4844 pool boilerplate by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1500\r\n* fix: P256 high s check by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1510\r\n* perf: use secp256k1 for recovery by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1484\r\n* fix(consensus): DKGs with failed shares are still successful, on-chain DKG is source of truth by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1512\r\n* fix(stablecoin-dex): propagate underflow/overflow errors by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1515\r\n\r\n## New Contributors\r\n* GMT+0000). Please upgrade your nodes before the date to make sure your nodes keep up-to-date.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* fix(tempo-bench): place DEX orders at tick spacing by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1121\r\n* feat: add allow-unregistered-handshakes cli flag by @laibe in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1125\r\n* fix(tempo-bench): clear txpool for all URLs and get start block from sent txs by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1123\r\n* feat: re-broadcast built subblocks multiple times by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1126\r\n* feat: add nonce key support for tempo tx request by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1122\r\n* fix!: stablecoin exchange overflow error by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1124\r\n* feat(precompiles): add missing FeeManager interface functions and pending fees validation by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1106\r\n* feat(precompiles): simplify storage internals by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1105\r\n* fix(tempo-sidercar): enable `alloy/provider-ws` feature by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1143\r\n* fix(subblocks): don't rebroadcast subblocks to oursevles by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1146\r\n* feat(dkg): add metrics for shares, acks, and dealings by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1042\r\n* feat(aa): allow recovered AA authorization lists by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1150\r\n* chore: more payload builder defaults by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1147\r\n* feat(tempo-bench): load-balance transactions between multiple URLs by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1141\r\n* feat: fee AMM liqudiity tracker by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1115\r\n* feat(alloy): random 2d nonce filler by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1138\r\n* feat: add `burnFrom` to TIP-20 by @danrobinson in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1140\r\n* feat!(stablecoin-exchange): create new dex pair on first order by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/985\r\n* Revert \"feat: add `burnFrom` to TIP-20\" by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1155\r\n* feat(alloy): configure random nonces on provider builder by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1158\r\n* fix(consensus): reject proposals, DKG dealings from wrong dealers by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1134\r\n* fix: add registry check on mint by @howydev in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1156\r\n* fix(mempool): ensure fee payer is not blacklisted by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1114\r\n* fix(precompiles): account for `is_bid` in `quote_exact_in` calc by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1130\r\n* chore: add Allegretto time to Andantino by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1154\r\n* fix: handle refunds in keychain contract by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1166\r\n\r\n## New Contributors\r\n* @laibe made their first contribution in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1125\r\n* @danrobinson made their first contribution in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1140\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/942\r\n* fix!(orderbook): add price bounds validation to price_to_tick() by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/939\r\n* test(bench): Include DEX book existence check to place_flip by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/845\r\n* fix!(stablecoin-exchange): validate base token is TIP20 in createPair by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/844\r\n* fix: correctly track `non_shared_gas_left` by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/879\r\n* fix!(stablecoin-exchange): check maxIn/maxOut only on final swap amount by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/882\r\n* chore(deps): bump to revm 33, latest Reth + fix zepter lint by @zerosnacks in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/878\r\n* refactor(chainspec): add is_moderato() helper method by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/894\r\n* feat(alloy): re-export `tempo-primitives` by @onbjerg in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/896\r\n* fix!(stablecoin-exchange): correct unit conversions and avoid rounding in swap order fills by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/890\r\n* chore: bump to 0.4.0 by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/899\r\n* feat(docs): deploy rust docs to gh pages by @onbjerg in event `from` to `Address::ZERO` on `mint_with_memo()` by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/913\r\n* fix(precompiles): update `transfer_from_with_memo` to emit transfer event from fix(precompiles): add insufficient liquidity error to `swap_exact_amount_in` post `Moderato` hardfork by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/919\r\n* fix: reject transactions without a fee token preference by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/916\r\n* fix: set coinbase validator token to LinkingUSD by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/910\r\n* test(e2e): implement validator restart and recovery test scenarios by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/783\r\n* feat(alloy): re-export `tempo-contracts` by @onbjerg in major release for the first persistent and public Tempo testnet.\r\n\r\nAll breaking changes will be released with a new major release version and the Andantino testnet is going to be upgraded through a hardfork.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* feat: expose `timestampMillis` on RPC header by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/757\r\n* fix(ci): build all binaries using Dockerfile by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/760\r\n* feat!: (precompiles) add missing stablecoin exchange functions by @howydev in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/765\r\n* fix!(contracts): update `StablecoinExchange` getPriceLevel to getTickLevel in interface/dispatch by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/767\r\n* fix!(fee-manager): add min liquidity to `TIPFeeManager` dispatch by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/773\r\n* fix!(linking-usd): disable rewards by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/774\r\n* fix!: correct mapping slots by @onbjerg in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/761\r\n* fix(consensus): relax starting conditions on height mismatch between execution, consensus layers by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/768\r\n* fix(download/follow): change defaults to actual testnet values by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/777\r\n* fix(transaction-pool): enable serde and reth-codec features in primitives dep by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/779\r\n* fix(genesis): add missing AlphaUSD-LinkingUSD liquidity pool and fix token order by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/781\r\n* feat(subblocks): forward transactions from RPC to subblocks service by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/780\r\n* fix: update fee token checks to match latest spec by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/776\r\n* chore: regenerate test genesis, fix tests, and enforce genesis consistency in CI by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/791\r\n* chore(revm): remove unused `transfer_token` function by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/807\r\n* feat!: error on none zero tx.value by @rakita in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/759\r\n* chore: add tempo binary features and porpagation by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/814\r\n* fix: remove --fund-test-accounts flag from generate-genesis by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/813\r\n* chore: bump revm patch by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/820\r\n* chore: rm reth crate from workspace by @mattsse in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/819\r\n* feat!(precompiles): storage primitives by @0xrusowsky in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/669\r\n* chore: release v0.3.0 by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/830\r\n\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: release for the first persistent and public Tempo testnet.\r\n\r\nAll breaking changes will be released with a new major release version and the Andantino testnet is going to be upgraded through a hardfork.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* chore: handler cleanup and revm bump by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/503\r\n* feat: `TempoTransactionRequest::calls` by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/518\r\n* chore(precompiles): restructure precompiles by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/521\r\n* chore: add missing txpool arg to `just localnet` by @shekhirin in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/511\r\n* feat: add missing linkingUSD functions by @howydev in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/537\r\n* feat: more missing linkingusd functions by @howydev in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/542\r\n* fix: Intrinsic gas calculations for AA txs by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/520\r\n* feat: Add `dex_getOrders` endpoint and schema by @RomanHodulak in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/546\r\n* feat(node): Launch node with `TempoDex` RPC module by @RomanHodulak in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/551\r\n* feat(node): Add JSON serialize and deserialize identity test to `dex_getOrders` by @RomanHodulak in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/552\r\n* data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/commits/v0.1.0</a></p>0:{\"root\":\"$L1\",\"route:/changelog\":[\"$\",\"$L2\",null,{\"id\":\"layout:/\",\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L2\",null,{\"id\":\"page:/changelog\"}]}],\"layout:/\":[\"$\",\"$L3\",null,{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L4\",null,{}]}],\"page:/changelog\":[\"$\",\"$L5\",null,{\"frontmatter\":{\"title\":\"Changelog\",\"lastModified\":\"2026-01-16T17:57:23+00:00\",\"filePath\":\"changelog.md\"},\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L6\",null,{\"children\":[[\"$\",\"h1\",null,{\"data-v\":\"\",\"id\":\"changelog\",\"children\":\"Changelog\"}],\"\\n\",[\"$\",\"$7\",null,{\"fallback\":[\"$\",\"$L8\",null,{}],\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L9\",null,{\"releases\":[{\"version\":\"v1.4.0\",\"title\":\"Release v1.4.0\",\"date\":\"2026-03-05T13:51:40Z\",\"body\":\"$a\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.4.0\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$b\"},{\"version\":\"v1.3.1\",\"title\":\"v1.3.1\",\"date\":\"2026-02-22T15:26:15Z\",\"body\":\"Some node operators reported issues during high load on Moderato testnet. It is recommended for testnet and mainnet node operators to upgrade.\\r\\n\\r\\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.3.1\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"<p data-v>Some node operators reported issues during high load on Moderato testnet. It is recommended for testnet and mainnet node operators to upgrade.</p>\\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\\\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1\\\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1</a></p>\"},{\"version\":\"v1.3.0\",\"title\":\"Release v1.3.0\",\"date\":\"2026-02-20T18:10:18Z\",\"body\":\"This patch release includes security hardening for expiring nonce replay protection and keychain precompile gas handling activated with T1A/T1B network upgrade. **It is required for all node operators to upgrade.**\\r\\n\\r\\n## What's Changed\\r\\n\\r\\n- fix: harden expiring nonce replay protection: Strengthens replay protection for expiring nonce transactions by using a hash derivation that is invariant to fee payer changes. \\r\\n\\r\\n- fix: update keychain precompile gas metering: Corrects gas accounting for keychain-authorized transactions to prevent double-charging, and ensures nonce is always properly incremented.\\r\\n\\r\\n- fix(evm): reset initial_gas in execution_result and catch_error: Fixes gas state handling in EVM error and result paths to ensure correct gas reporting.\\r\\n\\r\\n- feat: raise per-transaction gas limit on testnet: Removal of EIP-7825's 16.7M per-transaction gas limit cap, raising it to Tempo's 30M cap\\r\\n\\r\\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.3.0\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$c\"},{\"version\":\"v1.2.0\",\"title\":\"v1.2.0 (Mainnet-only)\",\"date\":\"2026-02-13T17:40:21Z\",\"body\":\"**â ï¸ Mainnet-only upgrade for node operators. Do not upgrade your testnet nodes.** This release fixes a validation bug on mainnet where transactions with gas limits above ~16.7M were incorrectly rejected, blocking large contract deployments. All node operators must upgrade to maintain network compatibility.\\r\\n\\r\\nNodes running older versions will reject blocks containing transactions with gas limits above 16.7M. Upgrading promptly avoids falling out of sync when validators raise the limit.\\r\\n\\r\\n**Full Changelog**: [v1.1.4...v1.2.0](https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.4...v1.2.0)\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.2.0\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"<p data-v><strong data-v>â ï¸ Mainnet-only upgrade for node operators. Do not upgrade your testnet nodes.</strong> This release fixes a validation bug on mainnet where transactions with gas limits above ~16.7M were incorrectly rejected, blocking large contract deployments. All node operators must upgrade to maintain network compatibility.</p>\\n<p data-v>Nodes running older versions will reject blocks containing transactions with gas limits above 16.7M. Upgrading promptly avoids falling out of sync when validators raise the limit.</p>\\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\\\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.4...v1.2.0\\\" data-v>v1.1.4...v1.2.0</a></p>\"},{\"version\":\"v1.1.4\",\"title\":\"v1.1.4\",\"date\":\"2026-02-12T22:56:14Z\",\"body\":\"$d\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.4\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$e\"},{\"version\":\"v1.1.3\",\"title\":\"v1.1.3\",\"date\":\"2026-02-12T17:35:32Z\",\"body\":\"$f\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.3\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$10\"},{\"version\":\"v1.1.2\",\"title\":\"v1.1.2\",\"date\":\"2026-02-10T22:07:18Z\",\"body\":\"This patch release includes a fix for an issue affecting follower nodes. If you're using `tempo --follow`, we recommend upgrading to this release.\\r\\n\\r\\n## What's Changed\\r\\n* fix: install default rustls crypto provider on startup by @gakonst in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2606: A recent dependency upgrade (rustls 0.23+) removed the built-in default crypto provider, causing nodes to panic with no process-level CryptoProvider available when opening WebSocket connections. This release explicitly installs the ring crypto provider at startup.\\r\\n\\r\\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.1...v1.1.2\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.2\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"<p data-v>This patch release includes a fix for an issue affecting follower nodes. If you're using <code data-v>tempo --follow</code>, we recommend upgrading to this release.</p>\\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\\n<ul data-v>\\n<li data-v>fix: install default rustls crypto provider on startup by @gakonst in <a href=\\\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2606\\\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/2606</a>: A recent dependency upgrade (rustls 0.23+) removed the built-in default crypto provider, causing nodes to panic with no process-level CryptoProvider available when opening WebSocket connections. This release explicitly installs the ring crypto provider at startup.</li>\\n</ul>\\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\\\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.1...v1.1.2\\\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v1.1.1...v1.1.2</a></p>\"},{\"version\":\"v1.1.1\",\"title\":\"v1.1.1 - T1 (Bach) Mainnet Network Upgrade\",\"date\":\"2026-02-10T18:49:51Z\",\"body\":\"$11\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.1\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$12\"},{\"version\":\"v1.1.0\",\"title\":\"v1.1.0 - T1 (Bach) Testnet Network Upgrade\",\"date\":\"2026-02-03T21:53:37Z\",\"body\":\"$13\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.1.0\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$14\"},{\"version\":\"v1.0.2\",\"title\":\"v1.0.2 - Mainnet candidate\",\"date\":\"2026-01-08T21:08:18Z\",\"body\":\"$27\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v1.0.0-rc.1\",\"prerelease\":true,\"bodyHtml\":\"$28\"},{\"version\":\"v0.8.1\",\"title\":\"Release v0.8.1\",\"date\":\"2025-12-22T16:22:06Z\",\"body\":\"## What's Changed\\r\\n\\r\\nThis release primarily contains fixes for various RPC endpoints\\r\\n* chore: serialize `chainId` and `expiry` as hex in eth_estimateGas by @legion2002 in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1683\\r\\n* fix: fill correct 2d nonce in `eth_fillTransaction` by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1684\\r\\n* fix: swap fillers by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1699\\r\\n* fix: correctly estimate 2d nonce gas by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/1700\\r\\n\\r\\nAll RPC nodes operators are encouraged to update their nodes as soon as possble\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v0.8.1\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$29\"},{\"version\":\"v0.8.0\",\"title\":\"v0.8.0: Allegro Moderato scheduled for Dec 22nd\",\"date\":\"2025-12-22T16:26:52Z\",\"body\":\"$2a\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v0.8.0\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$2b\"},{\"version\":\"v0.7.5\",\"title\":\"Release v0.7.5\",\"date\":\"2025-12-15T17:10:04Z\",\"body\":\"$2c\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v0.7.5\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$2d\"},{\"version\":\"v0.7.4\",\"title\":\"v0.7.4\",\"date\":\"2025-12-11T14:23:06Z\",\"body\":\"$2e\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v0.7.4\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"$2f\"},{\"version\":\"v0.7.3\",\"title\":\"v0.7.3 - Andantino testnet patches\",\"date\":\"2025-11-20T12:08:13Z\",\"body\":\"This is a patch release that prepares the Andantino testnet for the Moderato hardfork (timestamp: Mon Nov 24 2025 16:00:00 GMT+0000). Please upgrade your nodes before the date to make sure your nodes keep up-to-date.\\r\\n\\r\\nThis patch version also includes a fix for better RPC transaction inclusion.\\r\\n\\r\\n## What's Changed\\r\\n* fix(faucet): send transactions to node's rpc by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/974\\r\\n* chore: bump reth by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/977\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/releases/tag/v0.5.1\",\"prerelease\":false,\"bodyHtml\":\"<p data-v>This is a patch release that prepares the Andantino testnet for the Moderato hardfork (timestamp: Mon Nov 24 2025 16:00:00 GMT+0000). Please upgrade your nodes before the date to make sure your nodes keep up-to-date.</p>\\n<p data-v>This patch version also includes a fix for better RPC transaction inclusion.</p>\\n<h2 data-v>What's Changed</h2>\\n<ul data-v>\\n<li data-v>fix(faucet): send transactions to node's rpc by @klkvr in <a href=\\\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/974\\\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/974</a></li>\\n<li data-v>chore: bump reth by @klkvr in <a href=\\\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/977\\\" data-v>https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/977</a></li>\\n</ul>\\n<p data-v><strong data-v>Full Changelog</strong>: <a href=\\\"https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1\\\" What's Changed\\r\\n* fix(precompiles): handle insufficient balance error in withdraw by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/502\\r\\n* fix(precompiles): determine trade direction dynamically in quote swap functions by @fgimenez in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/501\\r\\n* chore: temporarily use Github native CI by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/505\\r\\n* fix(ci): ubuntu-latest-4 doesn't exist by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/506\\r\\n* feat(dev): add localnet just target by @Zygimantass in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/472\\r\\n* fix: handle `mintWithMemo` and `burnWithMemo` by @klkvr in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/509\\r\\n* chore: refactor fee calc in deduct_caller with helpers by @rakita in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/492\\r\\n\\r\\n## New Contributors\\r\\n* @rakita made their first contribution in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/492\\r\\n\\r\\n**Full Changelog**: activate external feature for runtime by @SuperFluffy in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/499\\r\\n\\r\\n\\r\\n**Full Changelog**: testnet patches\",\"date\":\"2025-10-19T15:15:24Z\",\"body\":\"- feat(precompiles): check if pair is already created in (#480)\\r\\n- fix: dont generate Some(0) for option u64 (#495)\\r\\n- feat(precompiles): emit order filled events (#496)\\r\\n- chore(precompiles): update stable exchange swap function names (#493)\\r\\n- chore(precompiles): update  to  (#494)\\r\\n\\r\\n## What's Changed\\r\\n* chore(precompiles): update `linkingToken` to `quoteToken` by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/494\\r\\n* chore(precompiles): update stable exchange swap function names by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/493\\r\\n* feat(precompiles): emit order filled events by @0xKitsune in https://github.com/tempoxyz/tempo/pull/496\\r\\n* fix: dont
